title: E-Commerce Operations Manager - Right Hand to the Founder
description:
We're a fast-growing Danish multi-brand e-commerce company, and we're looking for someone to work directly alongside the founder as his right hand. You'll own workflows, solve problems, and help scale a multi-brand operation - with real responsibility from the start.

We're looking for someone who has already owned something. Not just followed instructions, but actually taken a messy process, figured out what was broken, and made it work better. The specific tools don't matter as much as the mindset - if you've done it before in any context, you can do it here.

The founder works closely with the team and will give you direct access to learn AI tools, automation, and advanced e-commerce strategy. We invest in the people who invest in us.

OUR CULTURE

We're a small, friendly team that genuinely enjoys working together. Everyone is supportive, always ready to help each other out, and we celebrate wins together. You'll be joining a warm, positive environment where your ideas matter and your growth is a priority. We also pay a Christmas bonus to show our appreciation for the people who help build this company.

WHAT YOU'LL DO



Manage and optimize daily e-commerce operations across multiple brands

Own workflows end-to-end - inventory, fulfillment, influencer coordination, supplier communication

Build and improve processes and automations (n8n, Make, AI tools)

Spot problems early and come back with solutions

Handle whatever needs handling - the scope evolves as the business grows, and you'll grow with it



WHO YOU ARE



Excellent English, written and spoken. Clear, confident communication is the one thing we won't compromise on.

You've owned something before. Maybe you managed operations for an e-commerce brand, ran a team's workflows, or built a system from scratch. You can point to something real and say "I did that."

A critical thinker who enjoys solving problems, not just flagging them.

Detail-oriented and precise. You take pride in getting things right.

You're energized by change. New tools, shifting priorities, and learning new things excite you rather than stress you out.

Experience with Shopify, Klaviyo, Google Sheets, or automation tools is a strong plus.



WHAT YOU'LL GET



Direct collaboration with the founder - strategy, AI tools, automation, and business growth

A path to become a top 1% AI-powered operator

A supportive team that has your back from day one

Real ownership with room to grow into a senior role

$8-$12/hour with raises tied to performance, plus a Christmas bonus



HOW TO APPLY

Your application MUST include all three of the following:



A short Loom video (2-3 minutes max) - Introduce yourself in English. Tell us what you like to do outside of work. Then walk us through something you've built, managed, or improved in a previous role. Please don't use a script - we want to hear the real you, and we can tell the difference.

Your DISC personality profile - Attach your DISC results as a PDF or screenshot. If you don't have one yet, take the free Tony Robbins DISC assessment at 
/disc.

Include the magic word "UNICORN" at the top of your application - This tells us you've read the full posting.



We're looking for one exceptional person to join our team. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: HR Manager
description:

title: HR Recruiter
description:

Utilize social media, networking events, and employee referrals to source passive candidates.

Build and maintain a talent pool for future hiring needs.

5. Background Check & Offer Management

Assist with pre-onboarding communications and documentation.

6. Recruitment Analytics

title: Logistics Virtual Assistant (with Lead Generation Experience)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive **Logistics Virtual Assistant (VA)** with experience in **driver dispatching, load management, and lead generation**. The ideal candidate is highly organized, tech-savvy, and comfortable handling multiple clients while supporting logistics and sales-related tasks.

* Track shipments and ensure timely updates using tracking tools

* Provide general administrative support as needed

* Assist with executive/administrative tasks when required



**Lead Generation & Sales Support**



* Identify and generate leads through various channels (e.g., load boards, online platforms, databases)

* Support outreach and prospecting efforts

* Maintain and update lead databases

* Assist in nurturing and qualifying potential clients



**Communication & Coordination**



* Communicate effectively with US-based clients using tools such as 
 and other platforms

* Coordinate with drivers, brokers, and clients to ensure smooth operations

* Provide timely updates and resolve issues proactively



**Required Qualifications**



* Proven experience in **logistics and dispatching**

* Experience monitoring **multiple load boards**

* Familiarity with logistics and tracking tools

* Background in **lead generation or sales support**

* Strong experience using **spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets)**

* Excellent organizational and multitasking skills

* Strong written and verbal English communication skills

* Comfortable working with **multiple clients**



**Preferred Qualifications**



* Experience as an **Executive Assistant (EA)** or in administrative support roles

* Familiarity with CRM and lead generation tools

title: Experienced TikTok Shop & Shopee Virtual Assistant — (Part Time, Per Hour Basis)
description:
NOTE: IF YOU DO NOT HAVE TIKTOK SHOP EXPERIENCE PLEASE DO NOT APPLY!



About this role

We are a Singapore-based business selling across two categories — F&B (food snacks) and jewellery & accessories. We need an experienced e-commerce VA to fully own and run our TikTok Shop and Shopee stores day-to-day.



This is not a junior or assistant role. We need someone who has genuinely built shops from zero — who knows what it takes to go from a blank storefront to consistent daily sales, and can do it again for us across two product categories. If you've done this before and know the playbook, you'll thrive here.



In general, here is what you'll do:

Full day-to-day management of TikTok Shop and Shopee storefronts

Product listing creation and optimisation — titles, descriptions, images, keywords, pricing

Order management — processing, tracking, coordinating fulfilment, handling disputes and returns

Set up and manage promotions — flash deals, vouchers, bundles, seasonal campaigns

Monitor shop health metrics — response rate, ship-on-time rate, listing quality scores, reviews

Run TikTok Shop and Shopee Ads at a basic to intermediate level (optional)

Weekly performance reporting — traffic, conversion, revenue, ad spend with clear recommendations

Customer chat management — pre-sale enquiries and post-sale issue resolution

--



1. (REQUIRED) Creator & affiliate management

Recruit creators and affiliates via TikTok Shop Affiliate Centre and Shopee Affiliate Programme

Build and manage a pool of micro and nano creators for F&B and lifestyle/accessories

Handle outreach, negotiation, briefing, onboarding, commission setting, and product seeding logistics

Track creator content performance — views, clicks, GMV attributed — and manage relationships ongoing

Identify top creators for paid or open collaboration upgrades

--



2. (REQUIRED) Shop setup experience

Must have set up brand-new shops from scratch — account registration, shop config, logistics, payment

Know the new shop launch playbook: warm-up strategies, early review acquisition, algorithm tactics

Familiar with how to build shop credibility fast — response rate, fulfilment speed, early buyer incentives

Familiar with Singapore and/or Southeast Asian market platform nuances

--



3. Tools you must know:

TikTok Seller Centre, TikTok Shop Affiliate Centre, TikTok Ads Manager

Shopee Seller Centre, Shopee Ads, Shopee Affiliate Programme

Canva (basic image editing), Google Sheets, Notion or similar PM tool

CapCut is a plus.

--



Who we're looking for:

Minimum 2 years hands-on experience running TikTok Shop and/or Shopee stores — not assisting, actually running them

Proven 0-to-1 track record — ready to share examples, screenshots, or performance data

Strong written English for customer comms and creator outreach

Organised, proactive, able to manage multiple stores and categories at once

Available during Singapore business hours (SGT) with at least 6 hours overlap daily

Stable internet and dedicated work setup

 campaigns in Mailchimp

s for clarity, readability, and brand consistency

Systems & Maintenance

Flag issues before they become problems

Commitment & Reliability (Non-Negotiable)

 This is a time-sensitive execution role tied directly to revenue.

title: Formulation Analyst — Haircare & Skincare (Amazon FBA)
description:
Formulation Analyst — Haircare & Skincare (Amazon FBA)



We build and launch haircare and skincare products on Amazon. We're looking for someone who can take a product category and tell us exactly how to win on the formula.

What the job is:



You get a category — scalp serums, hair growth treatments, anti-aging skincare, whatever — and you come back with a formulation brief. What ingredients, what doses, what to avoid, why our competitors are weak, and what a better product looks like. You'll use AI tools, scientific literature, supplier data, Amazon reviews, and whatever else gets you to the right answer fast.



This isn't lab work. It's research, analysis, and structured thinking. You need to be able to read a competitor's label, identify where they cut corners, and propose something meaningfully better.

You're right for this if you:



Have a background in cosmetic chemistry, dermatology, trichology, or haircare/skincare formulation — or you've self-taught to a serious level

Are fast with AI tools and know how to use them to compress research time

Can produce a clean, opinionated brief — not a list of options, an actual recommendation with reasoning

Understand how Amazon products compete — reviews, ingredient trends, claims, pricing

Work independently, close tasks fully, and communicate clearly



To apply:

 Answer this:



Pick any haircare or skincare product in the top 10 on Amazon. What's wrong with how the market leader has formulated it, and what would your version look like? Key ingredients, your reasoning, and the one thing that makes it meaningfully better.

Short, specific, opinionated. That answer is your application.

title: Customer Service Representative / Client Relationship Manager
description:
Job description: We are a Disability and Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing workplace!



The Company: We are a Disability Tax Credit / Financial Services company based in Port Moody, BC, Canada. We offer our employees competitive compensation, bonus incentives and a fun, energetic, and high-performing work environment! Swift Disability Services assists Canadians in applying for and obtaining approval of the Disability Tax Credit. We work closely with Canadians and their medical professionals to ensure the highest chances of success in what could result in over $45,000 in payments from the CRA to deserving Canadians. We have helped Canadians collect more than $35,000,000 in tax refunds within the last 3 years!



Our mission is to make a meaningful impact on the lives of as many Canadians as possible. We have a built a reputation of unparalleled customer service, leveraging technology and automation to create a more enjoyable experience for our customers and make lives easier for our staff. At Swift, we understand that our people are our most important asset!





The Position:

We are dedicated to building a team of high-performing individuals. We are looking for individuals to join our team in the role of Client Relationship Manager. This position is similar to that of a call-center agent. We are looking for individuals who have a proven ability to go above and beyond in order to excel in their position and drive value for a business. We are looking for individuals who are reliable, can handle 100+ calls per day, and can provide exceptional customer service to our clients.



We’re looking to add multiple Client Relationship Managers (sales staff) to our team.



The position will include:

• $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience), paid bi-weekly via Paypal

• Target Based Commission / Additional Incentives

• Extensive Training and Support

• 40 hours/week required (Mon – Fri, 8AM – 4:30PM, PST)

• Business casual dress code





Position Requirements:

• High-Volume Call Management: High-performing individual with a proven ability to exceed targets and expectations, with comfortability handling 100+ inbound/outbound calls per.

• Clear and Effective Communication: Exceptionally proficient in both written and verbal English communication to convey information clearly and effectively.

• Versatility and Proactive Mindset: Eagerness to tackle diverse tasks with a can-do attitude and a willingness to assist wherever needed. Is okay with "repetitive" work.

• Compassionate Client Support: Passion for supporting individuals in need and contributing to meaningful change in their lives.

• Self-Initiated Learning: Demonstrated ability to swiftly grasp new concepts in a multi-faceted role and self-motivate for continuous learning.

• Masterful Organization: Strong organizational skills to efficiently manage multiple tasks and responsibilities simultaneously.

• Proficiency in Administrative Tasks: Aptitude in data entry, filing, and performing tasks with a high level of accuracy.

• Meticulous Attention to Detail: Exceptional ability to maintain accuracy and precision in all tasks. In your application, please let us know your favourite summer activity – aside from getting to know you better, this will tell us if you have read the ad carefully!

• Proficiency in Office 365 Suite: Advanced understanding and utilization of Office 365 applications including Word, Excel (advanced skills), Outlook, and Sharepoint.

• Administrative Experience: Prior experience in an office/call center/sales or virual assistant role is required.

• Medical Industry Knowledge (Preferred): Experience or familiarity with medical terminology or healthcare environments is an asset.





Basic Technical Requirements:

• Effective Work Environment: Ensure a dedicated, organized, and ergonomically suitable workstation conducive to productivity and free of distractions. This includes having your own reliable laptop/desktop computer with 8GB RAM and Chrome installed.

• Hardware Capacity: Adequate space on your laptop/desktop computer to efficiently download and run various software required for the job.

• Internet Connection: Maintain a consistent and stable internet connection of at least 10MBPS, along with a backup internet option.

• Equipment: An ideal setup includes the availability of a dual monitor configuration and noise-canceling headset/headphones for an optimal working experience.





Main Responsibilities:

Reporting to the General Manager, the CRM/DTC Specialist is responsible for (1) Making outbound calls to identify individuals who meet the criteria and (2) sending and collecting completed onboarding forms required in order for us to move forward with their claim. Some of the key activities involved in this role are:



• Answering phones and making outbound calls

• Onboarding new clients based on qualification criteria

• Following up on new customer leads via phone, text, and

• Following up on e-documents sent to prospective clients

• Effectively moving clients through each step of the DTC process

• Striving to beat daily, weekly, and monthly targets





Why Should You Apply?

• You want to be part of a fast-growing and fast-paced business, with opportunities for advancement and a long-term career

• You are a high-performing individual with strong attention to detail

• You want a stable job with a competitive wage

• You want to make meaningful impact on the lives of Canadian individuals and families

• You are a positive person who wants to join a fun and friendly work environment





Job Type: Full-time

How to Apply: Attach resume and cover letter

Salary: $5 CAD per hour (dependent on experience)

Schedule: 8 hour shift

Supplemental pay types: Bonus pay

Education: Bachelor's Degree (preferred)

Experience: Administrative, minimum 1 year (required)

Experience: Medical/Health, minimum 1 year (required)

title: Affiliate Entrepreneur - Earn 25% Commissions by promoting DTC brand (Previously US-Only, Now Open Globally)
description:
Earn $1,000–$5,000+/month building your own income stream with established e-commerce brands.

We're looking for driven, entrepreneurial individuals to join our affiliate program - previously exclusive to US-based partners, now open to international talent for the first time.

This isn't a typical VA role. You'll be building something for yourself while helping scale real brands.



How It Works: 3 Levels:

Level 1: Affiliate (Entry)



No retainer — pure commission

25% commission on all sales you generate

Prove yourself here first. Show us you can move product and you level up.



Level 2: Senior Affiliate (Proven Performers)



$300/month retainer (guaranteed)

30% commission on all sales

You've shown results, now you get stability + higher payouts



Level 3: Affiliate Manager (Top Dogs)



$800+/month retainer (negotiable based on team size)

30% commission on your own sales

10% override on every sale your team generates

You're leading people, building systems, and scaling the whole operation





What We're Looking For:



Some copywriting or editing experience - you know how to write things that sound human and sell

AI tool experience: Have used Veo3, eleven labs, heygen, image generating tools and know how to use them well.

Fast learner - you pick things up quickly and don't need hand-holding

Entrepreneurial mindset - you see this as building YOUR income, not just "a job"

Reliable and responsive - you move fast, communicate clearly, and don't disappear





Why This Is Different:

Most affiliate programs for non-US talent offer 5% commissions at best. We're offering 25–30?cause we want partners who are actually invested in results.

You'll get full training, brand assets, and support — but we expect you to show up and put in the work. If we don't see effort or progress within 1–2 months, we part ways. Simple.



To Apply:

Send a short message explaining:



Your experience with copywriting or content editing

Why you want to build income through affiliate marketing

How many hours/week you can dedicate to this



Move fast. We're only onboarding a small group.

title: Virtual Assistant for Car Dealership & Service Facility
description:
**Job Title:**

Executive Virtual Assistant for Luxury Car Dealership & Service Business



**Job Type:**

Full-Time Virtual Assistant



**About the Role:**

We are hiring a highly organized, professional, and proactive Virtual Assistant to support a fast-moving luxury automotive dealership and service business based in Los Angeles, California.



This is not a basic admin or data entry role. We are looking for someone sharp, dependable, detail-oriented, and capable of helping bring structure, follow-through, and consistency to daily operations.



You will assist with customer communication, lead follow-up, CRM updates, appointment coordination, paperwork tracking, reporting, and general operational support. Your work will directly impact how efficiently the business runs.



**Applicants with automotive, dealership, service, reconditioning, CRM, or dealership accounting experience will be given strong preference.** If you already understand the automotive world in some capacity, that is a major plus and will set you apart.



**Key Responsibilities:**



* Follow up with leads and customers by
, text, and CRM

* Update and maintain customer records accurately

* Confirm sales and service appointments

* Track open tasks, pending follow-ups, and missing items

* Help organize deal paperwork and administrative files

* Assist with title, registration, and document follow-up

* Follow up on invoices, receivables, and vendor items

* Build and maintain spreadsheets, trackers, and reports

* Assist with inventory listings and online posting support

* Help improve internal organization and workflow consistency

* Provide general executive and operations support as needed



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Excellent written and spoken English

* Strong attention to detail

* Highly organized and dependable

* Able to take ownership of tasks

* Professional and responsive communicator

* Comfortable working independently

* Strong with Google Docs, Google Sheets,
, and online systems

* Fast learner who can adapt to new tools and processes

* Able to work with urgency and follow through consistently



**Preferred Experience:**



* Virtual assistant or executive assistant experience

* Customer service or appointment setting

* CRM experience

* Administrative or operations support

* Automotive experience is a major plus

* Dealership experience is a major plus

* Experience with car buying, car sales, service advising, reconditioning, parts/service coordination, title/reg follow-up, and dealership accounting is a major plus

* Experience with reporting, receivables follow-up, document tracking, and inventory management is highly valued



**Ideal Candidate:**

We strongly prefer someone who already understands the automotive space in some capacity. That could include experience working for a dealership, independent dealer, service shop, automotive broker, body shop, recon department, transport company, or any business related to car sales or service.



You do not need to know everything on day one, but familiarity with the automotive world is a big advantage.



We are looking for someone exceptional, not just available. This is a long-term opportunity for the right person.



**Work Schedule:**

Monday to Friday

Must have working hours that overlap with Los Angeles business hours



**Compensation:**

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Advertising Strategist
description:
About Us:

Our company is a remote platform located in the United States. We provide mental health counseling services via video and telephone. The working hours for this position are Monday through Friday, 10 AM — 7 PM CST. We work with a broad demographic population that suffers from a wide range of mental illnesses. We are committed to making care accessible and impactful.

To Apply:

Key Responsibilities:

• Design, implement, and manage digital advertising campaigns across platforms (Google,
, LinkedIn, etc.)

• Create and manage provider advertising profiles across multiple professional directories (Psychology Today, Mental        Health Match, Zocdoc, Etc.) 

• Align ad strategies with company vision, values, and target demographics

• Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance, providing actionable insights in weekly meetings

• Research and analyze competitors and industry trends to inform advertising tactics

• Test new ad formats, messaging, and targeting to improve results

• Gather and share relevant audience insights with the team

• Attend professional development opportunities and relevant industry events

• Demonstrate cultural awareness and the ability to connect with multicultural audiences

• Other related duties as needed



What We’re Looking For:

• Passion for mental health advocacy and advertising

• Fluent English and strong creative/analytical skills

• Deep understanding of U.S. culture and digital advertising platforms

• Proven experience managing and optimizing digital ad campaigns

• Ability to analyze data and translate insights into action

• Competency using artificial intelligence apps and tools

• Strategic thinker with excellent communication skills



Benefits:

• Paid time off (PTO)

• Sick time off (STO)

• Paid holidays

• Quarterly performance bonuses

• Health insurance (after 1 year)

• Mental health services reimbursement

• Additional perks

________________________________________

Ready to make a difference? Submit your resume and video introduction today.

title: Content Researcher - TikTok & Reels Trend Spotter (Remote, Part-Time)
description:
We're P1 Agency - a growing social media marketing agency. We help brands and creators build their audience through trend-driven content strategies across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.



We're looking for a Content Researcher who lives and breathes TikTok and Instagram Reels. Your job is simple but important: find the trends before they trend.



What you'll do every day:

- Scroll TikTok and Instagram Reels with purpose - spotting emerging trends, viral formats, and trending sounds before they peak

- Build a daily content research pool: collect video links, explain why each one works, and suggest how it could be adapted for our clients' content strategies

- Track trending sounds and identify which ones are about to blow up

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) to speed up your research and organize findings

- Deliver a structured daily report with your top picks + reasoning



This role is for you if:

- You spend 2+ hours a day on TikTok or Reels anyway - and you're the person your friends go to for "have you seen this video?"

- You can explain WHY something goes viral, not just spot that it did

- You have strong English writing skills (you'll explain trends in writing daily)

- You're organized, self-motivated, and don't need someone checking on you every hour

- You're comfortable with AI tools and use them regularly



This role is NOT for you if:

- You think "content research" means copying trending hashtag lists from Google

- You can't tell the difference between a video that went viral by luck vs. one with a replicable format

- You need constant supervision to stay productive



Schedule: 5 hours/day, 5 days/week (Monday-Friday). Flexible hours - we care about output, not when you sit at your desk.



Compensation: $500/month starting. After a 1-month trial period, salary increases to $600/month based on performance. Additional growth opportunities as the team scales.



How to apply:

Do NOT send your resume here. Instead, complete our short application funnel - it takes about 10 minutes and includes a small task so we can see how you think:



perspectivefunnel.co/6821de827fc069003bb2dc46/69c051a068b25b2f975c0db3/



If the link above is not visible or clickable on your device, message us on
 and we'll send it to you 



Applications without completing the funnel will not be reviewed.

title: 3D Visualization Specialist (Keyshot & Photoshop Expert)
description:
We’re looking for a high-impact 3D Visualization Specialist to own the creation of high-performing product visuals used in Amazon listings, product launches, and marketing campaigns.



This is not a generalist role. We are looking for someone who is:



·     Advanced in KeyShot (expert level required)

·     Fluent in Photoshop for final image production

·     Experienced creating conversion-focused eCommerce product imagery (Amazon preferred)

 

You will take CAD files, concepts, and real products and turn them into photorealistic renders and animations that drive clicks and conversions.



Responsibilities



·     Product Rendering & eCommerce Visuals

·     Create photorealistic product renders for Amazon listings, DTC, and marketing

·     Build lighting setups and materials that accurately reflect real-world products

·     Produce Amazon-ready images (main images, feature callouts, infographics in collaboration with Marketing)

·     Ensure visual consistency across product lines

 

Photoshop & Final Asset Production



·     Use Photoshop to retouch, composite, and finalize images

·     Prepare assets for Amazon and eCommerce requirements

·     Enhance renders with backgrounds, shadows, and contextual elements when needed

 

Product Animation



·     Create KeyShot animations demonstrating product features and functionality

·     Produce short, clean clips for ads and product pages

 

Studio & Workflow Development



·     Build and maintain repeatable KeyShot studios, lighting rigs, and templates

·     Improve rendering efficiency and turnaround time

title: Video Editor - Music/Entertainment
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



Have you ever wanted to work in the music industry? Or maybe edit dance videos along with some entertainment content?



We’re looking for a full-time Video Editor to join our creative team working across music and entertainment content. You'll be editing both long-form videos for YouTube and short-form content for TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts. The role requires strong proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve, as well as a good eye for storytelling, colour grading, and rhythm. title: Marketing Specialist — Shopify & Google Ads
description:
Marketing Specialist — Shopify & Google Ads

Branch Chandelier  |  Full-time, remote (China)

About Us

Branch Chandelier is a cross-border e-commerce brand specializing in chandeliers and decorative lighting for the US market. With 300+ active SKUs covering both residential and large commercial fixtures, we sell through our Shopify store and Amazon, with an average order value around $2,000.

We operate a hybrid fulfillment model with US East and West Coast warehouses plus direct shipping from China. Our team spans a China day shift for product and operations, and a Philippines night shift for US-hours customer support. We're at an exciting growth stage with strong product-market fit, ready to scale our marketing engine — that's where you come in.

The Role

We're looking for a Marketing Specialist who can own both our Shopify storefront and our Google Ads performance. You'll be the bridge between our product catalog and our customers — making sure the store converts and the ads bring in the right buyers at the right cost.

What You'll Do

Shopify (50%)

•Manage and optimize our Shopify store (Beatnik/Symmetry theme)

•Upload, edit, and organize product listings across 300+ SKUs

•Improve product pages for conversion (copy, images, layout, structured data)

•Configure collections, navigation, filters, and on-site search

•Install, configure, and troubleshoot Shopify apps

•Monitor site performance, page speed, and mobile experience

•Run A/B tests on landing pages and checkout flow

Google Ads (50%)

•Plan, launch, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Performance Max)

•Build and maintain the Google Merchant Center product feed

•Monitor daily performance: ROAS, CPA, CTR, conversion rate

•Optimize bids, budgets, keywords, and audiences

•Run remarketing campaigns and audience segmentation

•Produce weekly performance reports with clear next actions

•Coordinate with our content team on ad creative

Requirements

•Bachelor's degree required

•2+ years hands-on experience managing Shopify stores (not just using them)

•2+ years managing Google Ads accounts with monthly spend of $5K+

•Proven track record of improving ROAS or conversion rate (please share examples)

•Solid understanding of Google Merchant Center and product feed optimization

•Comfortable with Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager

•Strong English reading and writing ability (our market is the US)

•Detail-oriented, data-driven, and able to work independently

Nice to Have

•Experience with cross-border e-commerce to the US market

•Background in home goods, furniture, or lighting categories

•Experience with high-AOV products ($1,000+)

•Familiarity with Shopify Liquid for theme customization

•Meta Ads or Pinterest Ads experience

•Experience with AI tools for marketing workflows

What We Offer

•Competitive base salary + performance bonus

•Direct ownership of marketing channels — your decisions, your results

•Growing brand with strong product-market fit in a premium category

•Day shift schedule (China hours)

•Collaborative team across China, Philippines, and the US

How to Apply

Please send:

1.Your CV

2.2–3 examples of Shopify stores you've worked on

3.A brief case study of one Google Ads account you've managed (industry, monthly spend, key results)

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260413
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Senior UX Designer
description:
This is a part-time, work-from-home contract running approximately 39 weeks. The total commitment is around 390 hours (roughly 49 working days) spread across the project lifecycle, with the workload varying by phase. You will be embedded within our Australian delivery team, working on a complex, multi-platform project that spans a responsive national website, a branded member mobile app, CRM integrations, and multiple third-party system touchpoints.



Indicative Weekly Commitment:

The heavier weeks are front-loaded. During the build phase, the role shifts to accessibility testing, design QA, and occasional UAT support.





What You Will Be Doing:

- Planning and conducting user research using qualitative and quantitative methods, then translating findings into clear, actionable recommendations

- Creating user personas, journey maps, information architecture, and interaction models that guide product strategy and design direction

- Designing intuitive, accessible interfaces for both web and mobile, with a strong focus on WCAG 2.1 AA+ compliance

- Building interactive prototypes and wireframes in Figma to communicate design intent to developers and stakeholders

- Producing developer-ready specifications, design systems, and component libraries that the build team can work from directly

- Collaborating with art directors, content specialists, developers, and project managers across Australian and international time zones

- Supporting accessibility and usability testing throughout the build and QA phases

- Mentoring junior designers and contributing to the continuous improvement of our UX processes and standards





What We Are Looking For:

- At least 10 years of hands-on experience in UX research and design for digital products, ideally across both web and native mobile

- A degree in Human-Computer Interaction, Psychology, Design, or a related field (or equivalent professional experience)

- Strong working knowledge of WCAG accessibility standards and inclusive design principles

- Expert-level proficiency in Figma, including design systems, prototyping, auto-layout, and developer handoff workflows

- Experience working within complex integration environments where UX decisions need to account for CRM data, tiered access models, SSO, or payment flows

- Solid analytical skills with the ability to synthesise research data into recommendations that non-technical stakeholders can act on

- Confident communication and presentation skills, comfortable working with senior client stakeholders

- Self-motivated, reliable, and able to work independently in a remote environment while staying closely connected to the wider team

- A portfolio that demonstrates your end-to-end UX process, not just final visual outputs



Nice to Have

- Experience with AI-assisted design tools such as Figma AI

- Familiarity with analytics and session recording tools (GA4, Hotjar, Mixpanel, or similar)

- Experience with content-heavy platforms requiring complex information architecture

- Previous work with Australian clients or within Australian digital agencies





What We Offer

- Day shift hours: 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Philippine time (on scheduled working days)

- Part-time contract, work from home

- Competitive day rate

- The opportunity to work on a genuinely interesting, large-scale project with a senior, collaborative team





How to Apply

Submit your CV, portfolio, and a brief cover note explaining why this role is the right fit for you.

If you are shortlisted following the initial interview, the next stage will include a practical skills assessment to help us find the best match for the role.

title: GHL EXPERT
description:
**Job Title:** GoHighLevel Specialist (Part-Time, Ongoing, $400-$500/mo, Start ASAP)



**Job Description:**



Health and wellness practice needs a GoHighLevel specialist to build and maintain funnels, a full website, landing pages, and
 automations. This is ongoing work, not a one-time project.



Hours: 10 -12 hours/week with option to increase.



First projects: Build sales pages, thank you pages, and order pages for two funnels (a digital course and a lab test funnel). Set up full
 sequences with conditional automations for both. Later, build a complete website inside GHL.



Ongoing: New funnels, page updates,
 edits, workflow troubleshooting, and website maintenance. Future projects will likely include setting up and managing a community forum inside GHL, lead tracking, and text automations. 



We have templates for all of the pages, and content will be provided.



YOU MUST HAVE:



1. 12+ months building funnels and websites for clients inside GoHighLevel (not WordPress, ClickFunnels, Kajabi, or Kartra).

2. Hands-on experience with GHL workflows: triggers, wait steps, if/else branches, tags, and pipelines.

3. Experience building full websites (not just single landing pages) inside GHL.

4. Portfolio of GHL pages and/or websites you built (live links or screenshots).

5. Ability to start within 5 business days.



Bonus: Experience with GHL's community/membership features is a strong plus.



TO APPLY: ANSWER THESE 3 QUESTIONS

(Applications that skip any question will not be reviewed.)



1. Show your work. Send 2 to 3 live links or screenshots of GHL funnel pages or websites you built. For bonus points, include a short Loom video walking me through one build.



2. Show a workflow. Attach a screenshot from inside GHL's workflow builder showing a real automation you created. Tell me in 2 sentences what it does.



3. Solve this scenario. A customer purchases a course. They get a welcome
 immediately, then login instructions 24 hours later. If they have not logged in after 72 hours, they get a reminder. If they have logged in, no reminder is sent. Walk me through exactly how you build this in GHL: which triggers, which workflow steps, which conditions.



NOTE: If your experience is mainly on other platforms and you plan to learn GHL on this job, this is not the right fit. I am looking for someone who already works in GoHighLevel daily.

title: Expert US Executive Assistant to the CEO (50 hours a week)
description:
About the Role

The Executive Assistant to the CEO serves as the operational backbone of Parity's strategic projects and organizational systems. You will build project timelines, track deliverables, manage cross-team communication, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The right person is detail-oriented, solutions-focused, and energized by helping teams turn vision into execution.



Key Responsibilities

Cross-Team Coordination



Coordinate and document strategic meetings, identifying next steps and responsible parties.

Manage projects using ClickUp and maintain accountability across teams.

Track deliverables, dependencies, and timelines across multiple initiatives.

Proactively flag delays, identify solutions, and adjust schedules as needed.

Maintain a central project calendar to ensure visibility of all major deadlines.

Administrative Support



Maintain and optimize the CEO's calendar, prioritizing key meetings and deadlines.

Coordinate internal and external meetings across multiple time zones.

Send reminders, prepare meeting briefs, and manage scheduling conflicts.

Monitor and organize the executive's inbox, drafting and sending professional communications.

Filter and prioritize messages to keep focus on strategic initiatives.

Written and Internal Communications



Draft and edit polished, brand-aligned written content such as
s, newsletters, blog posts, and internal memos.

Create client-facing materials including announcements, templates, and onboarding documents.

Maintain SOPs, team handbooks, and process documentation.

Travel and Event Coordination



Plan and manage travel logistics, including flights, accommodations, and ground transportation.

Prepare detailed itineraries and oversee travel budgets.

Organize virtual or in-person events, conferences, and client meetings.

Systems and Process Management



Support implementation and optimization of communication and documentation tools.

title: #### Real Estate Dispositions Manager | US Market | Immediate Start | Remote ####
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented, and communication-driven professional to join our real estate investment company in a hybrid role that combines Transaction Coordination and Dispositions Management.



This role is ideal for someone who understands the full lifecycle of a real estate wholesale deal—from contract to close—and can excel at both managing transactions and selling deals to qualified buyers.



Core Responsibilities



Transaction Coordination Duties

==============================

Make the introduction call to clients and establish communication from contract to close.

Coordinate with title companies, ensuring all requirements are met and deals close on time.

Schedule and manage property access, showings, inspections, and visits.

Set clear expectations with sellers, explaining timelines, next steps, and required documents.

Communicate with buyers to ensure they submit their EMD (Earnest Money Deposit) on time.

Track deadlines, title status, and closing milestones to prevent delays.

Knowledge of CRMs such as GoHighLevel/Podio is a strong advantage.

Experience handling complex transactions such as probates, foreclosures, sub-to, liens, and title issues.



Dispositions Duties

==============================

Publish new deals on relevant marketing platforms (InvestorLift,
 groups,
 blasts, etc.).

Contact prospective buyers, present the deal, and negotiate interest.

Secure signed assignment agreements and guide buyers through the process.

Add interested and qualified buyers to the company’s CRM, tagging and organizing them appropriately.

Build and maintain strong relationships with buyers to increase repeat sales.



Qualifications

==============================

Experience in real estate wholesaling, especially in transactions or dispositions.

Strong communication and customer-service skills.

Organized, efficient, and able to manage multiple deals simultaneously.

Ability to problem-solve title issues and keep deals on track.

Comfortable on the phone and confident speaking with buyers and sellers.

CRM experience (GoHighLevel/Podio preferred-We are moving from Podio to GHL).



What We’re Looking For

==============================

Someone proactive who takes full ownership of their deals.

Someone who can keep deals moving smoothly while also driving sales on the dispo side.

A high-energy team player who thrives in a fast-paced real estate environment.



** Big plus **

> Podio (workspaces, apps, tasks, basic automations-We are moving to GHL in a couple of weeks).

> Real estate wholesaling/investment experience (ARV, repair estimates, dispositions).



How to apply

=========================

> Via OnlineJobs,
, or Teams with:

>> “I’m a Disposition Wizard” at the top

> Link to CV

> Brief voice sample (60–90s intro or past call snippet)

> Your availability, time zone, and monthly salary (USD)

> Tools you’ve used for comps and CRM

> This role is modeled on our acquisitions workflow and deal analysis standards.

title: Head of Podcast & YouTube Growth Strategy
description:
She’s Making Millions is a fast-growing podcast and media brand for ambitious women building 6 - 7 figure businesses. Hosted by international speaker and entrepreneur Taylor Victoria, the show shares real conversations about scaling companies, creating wealth, and stepping into leadership.



Our mission is to help 1 million women build million-dollar businesses.



We are hiring a strategic growth lead who knows how to turn strong podcast content into serious audience growth, with a major focus on YouTube SEO, discoverability, click-through rate, watch-time, and long-term channel performance.



This is a strategy and growth role for someone who deeply understands how YouTube works, how podcast content gets discovered, and how to optimise every episode so it has the best possible chance of ranking, being clicked, being watched, and driving binge behaviour.



Role Overview



You will own the growth of our podcast and YouTube channel.



Your core responsibility is to make sure every episode is positioned to perform.



That includes:

increasing downloads, subscribers, watch-time, retention, and click-through rates

leading YouTube SEO strategy across every episode

crafting high-performing titles and thumbnail briefs

improving visibility through search, suggested content, and browse traffic

analysing performance data and making smart recommendations weekly

working closely with the producer and content team to improve packaging and growth



Key Responsibilities

YouTube SEO and discoverability

Develop and execute a clear YouTube growth strategy with strong SEO foundations

Research keywords, topics, search behaviour, and competitor content to improve discoverability

Optimise every episode for YouTube search, suggested videos, and browse traffic

Write or guide SEO-informed titles that balance discoverability with clickability

Create detailed thumbnail briefs designed to improve CTR

Optimise descriptions, chapters, playlists, metadata, and internal linking

Identify opportunities to improve ranking, visibility, and long-tail traffic over time



Episode packaging and performance

Ensure every episode is packaged for performance before publishing

Strengthen hooks, structure, titles, and thumbnail direction to improve watch-time and retention

Make sure each episode becomes a binge-worthy content asset, not just a one-off upload

Recommend improvements to intros, episode flow, and content positioning based on data



Growth and distribution 

Build and execute a 12-month podcast and YouTube growth strategy

Develop promotional plans for each episode across YouTube, Shorts, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn

Collaborate with guests and the team to increase episode sharing and reach

Help drive more consistent audience growth across both podcast and YouTube platforms



Analytics and reporting

Track performance across YouTube and podcast platforms

Review CTR, watch-time, retention, subscriber growth, traffic sources, and downloads

Run weekly tests and recommend changes based on performance

Report insights, wins, opportunities, and next actions directly to Taylor each week



Success Metrics

You will be measured on:

download growth, target 2x within 6 months

YouTube watch-time and audience retention

click-through rate on titles and thumbnails

subscriber growth month over month

guest share rate, target 80 percent or higher

improved discoverability through search and suggested traffic



Required Skills

Strong experience growing YouTube channels, podcast channels, or both

Strong understanding of YouTube SEO, keyword strategy, search intent, metadata, and discoverability

Ability to write high-converting, SEO-aware titles without sounding robotic or generic

Strong understanding of CTR, retention, watch-time, and how they work together

Able to analyse performance data and turn insights into action

Strong instincts for hooks, audience psychology, and episode packaging

Proactive, strategic, creative, and highly performance-driven

Excellent communication and able to work closely with a producer and content team



Bonus if

You have worked on a creator-led brand or podcast before

You have helped grow a channel through YouTube search and suggested traffic

You understand how to turn long-form episodes into a larger content growth system

You care about women in business, leadership, and wealth-building conversations



Compensation

$500 - $800 AUD per month depending on experience

performance-based bonuses for hitting growth milestones

long-term opportunity with room to grow into a leadership role



To Apply, please send:

1. your CV and portfolio

2. examples of channels, podcasts, or content brands you have helped grow



Why This Role Matters



This role is about more than uploading content.



You will help shape how this brand is found, watched, and remembered.



You will play a key role in helping more women discover the show, trust the brand, and build wealth through the ideas and conversations we share.



If you are strategic, SEO-savvy, obsessed with performance, and know how to grow content on YouTube, we want to hear from you.

title: Website Copywriter For A Marketing Agency
description:
**Job Title:** Copywriter

**Company:** Grove London

**Location:** Remote / Hybrid

**Job Type:** Full-Time



## About Grove London



Grove London is a full-service marketing agency working across influencer marketing, talent management, celebrity partnerships and bookings, paid ads campaigns, affiliate marketing support for brands, and Airbnb management. We work with both exclusive and non-exclusive creators, allowing us to move quickly, offer flexible solutions, and execute client partnerships efficiently.



With a growing team of over 30 professionals, Grove London supports brands, talent, and partners through creative strategy, strong industry relationships, and fast-moving campaign execution.



## Job Overview



Grove London is seeking a talented, commercially aware, and detail-oriented Copywriter to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who can write clear, persuasive, and polished copy across multiple services while understanding how strong messaging supports conversions, builds trust, and improves the user experience.



The successful candidate will play an important role in shaping how Grove London is presented across its website, service pages, outreach materials, sales decks, campaign materials, and brand communications. This is not just a writing role. We are looking for someone who understands how to frame messaging in a way that helps website visitors and potential clients quickly understand our services and take action.



## Key Responsibilities



* Write and refine high-quality copy for the Grove London website

* Develop clear and persuasive messaging for service pages across influencer marketing, talent management, celebrity partnerships and bookings, paid ads campaigns, affiliate marketing support, and Airbnb management

* Structure website copy for strong conversion and easy user navigation

* Write homepage copy, landing pages, about pages, calls to action, and lead-generation content

* Support the agency with copy for pitch decks, proposals, outreach
s, presentations, and branded materials

* Create compelling copy that communicates the value of our exclusive and non-exclusive creator network

* Help position Grove London as a premium, flexible, fast-moving, and results-driven agency

* Edit and improve existing content to strengthen clarity, professionalism, and commercial impact

* Work closely with internal teams including account managers, campaign managers, designers, and leadership

* Maintain a strong and consistent brand voice across all company touchpoints

* Research audience behavior, competitor positioning, and industry trends to improve messaging performance

* Simplify complex services into clear, attractive, and conversion-focused language



## What the Copywriter Will Be Working On



* Website copy

* Service page content

* Landing pages

* Agency profile wording

* Brand messaging

* Outreach
s

* Sales materials

* Client pitch decks

* Campaign copy

* Paid ad messaging

* Affiliate campaign support copy

* Talent-facing communication

* Case studies

* Calls to action

* SEO-friendly website content

* Airbnb listing and booking-focused descriptions

* Marketing and promotional materials



## Requirements



* Proven experience as a copywriter, content writer, or similar writing role within a marketing, media, creative, or digital agency environment

* Excellent English writing, editing, and proofreading skills

* Strong understanding of persuasive writing and conversion-focused messaging

* Ability to adapt tone of voice for different audiences, industries, and services

* Understanding of website structure, user journey, and how copy impacts conversions

* Ability to write both creatively and strategically

* Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple projects at once

* Ability to work effectively within a larger team environment

* Good understanding of branding, marketing, and digital communications

* Experience in influencer marketing, talent management, paid media, affiliate marketing, or agency work is highly desirable



## Preferred Skills



* Experience writing for service-based businesses

* Familiarity with SEO copywriting principles

* Ability to write premium, brand-led, and direct-response copy

* Strong research skills

* Understanding of consumer behavior and sales psychology

* Confidence in developing messaging that supports both brands and creators



## What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who can help Grove London communicate its value clearly and professionally. The right person should be able to write in a way that makes our business feel:



* Trusted

* Professional

* Premium

* Easy to understand

* High-converting

* Flexible

* Well-connected

* Results-driven



## Why Join Grove London



* Join a fast-growing agency with over 30 tea
mbers

* Work across exciting areas including influencer marketing, celebrity partnerships, and talent management

* Be part of a flexible and fast-moving team

* Help shape the public voice and positioning of a modern global agency

* Contribute directly to how the company wins clients and grows its presence



## How to Apply



Please send your CV, portfolio, and any relevant writing samples that show your ability to write website copy, marketing content, and conversion-focused messaging.



If applying, candidates should ideally include examples of:



* Website copy

* Landing pages

* Sales or pitch materials

* Brand messaging

* Service-based marketing copy

title: Warm Lead Caller – Structured Role | US Hours + Weekend Coverage | Base + Commission
description:
Some roles are unpredictable.

This one isn’t.



At Acquisition Ascension, we’ve built a simple system:



A lead comes in ? you call ? you qualify ? you confirm ? they show up.



That’s the job.



Every person you speak to has already shown interest. They’re not random. They’re not cold. They’re expecting a follow-up.



Your role is to stay on top of the process and make sure nothing breaks.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Calling new leads as soon as they come in

Booking leads who haven’t scheduled yet

Confirming appointments and setting expectations

Calling again ~1 hour before the call

Keeping CRM updates clean and accurate

Staying consistent during US hours + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

A clear, repeatable workflow

Warm, inbound leads only

A role where consistency is actually rewarded



Who This Role Is For:

You speak clear, confident English

You’ve done calling, support, or appointment setting before

You’re comfortable working US time zones

You can reliably cover weekends

You don’t need constant direction — you follow systems well

You take pride in doing things properly, every time



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 minutes):



Your experience with calling or customer-facing roles

Your availability for US hours + weekends

How you usually handle follow-ups and confirmations



We’re hiring one person to run this process.

If you want a role where things are clear, consistent, and under control — apply now.



— Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

title: Task Manager – Local SEO (Maps Department)
description:
Remote | Full-Time | $4/hr (U.S.-based company)

We are a growing internet marketing agency specializing in Local SEO and Google Maps visibility for small businesses. We are hiring a Task Manager to oversee workflows, ensure task completion, and maintain quality across multiple client accounts.

This role is best suited for someone highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple moving pieces without constant oversight.



Important Notes

- This is a full-time, long-term position  (must work M-F 8-4 PST)

- Must be comfortable working in a structured, process-driven environment

- Daily accountability and task tracking are required



Role Expectations

- Each assigned account is part of a long-term (12-month) campaign, requiring consistent monitoring, follow-through, and performance awareness

- Maintain organization and continuity across accounts over extended timelines

- Ensure no gaps in execution, communication, or task progression throughout the lifecycle of each account



Key Responsibilities

- Manage up to 20 client accounts simultaneously

- Monitor task completion and enforce deadlines amongst 2 tea
mbers

- Perform quality checks to ensure work meets internal standards

- Identify issues, risks, or delays and escalate as needed to team lead

- Track ongoing items until fully resolved

- Oversee workflow for 2 supporting tea
mbers

- Support local SEO efforts related to Google Maps optimization



Requirements

- Strong attention to detail and accountability

- Ability to manage multiple accounts and priorities independently

- Comfortable tracking, auditing, and following up on tasks daily

- Strong communication and problem-solving skills

- Reliable, consistent, and deadline-driven 



Preferred (Not Required)

- Familiarity with Google Maps or Local SEO

- Experience in SEO, digital marketing, or citation/listing work

- Previous task coordination or project management experience



To Apply 

We are looking for candidates who pay close attention to detail and can follow instructions precisely.

Please include the following in your application:

 In the first line of your response, include:

 “Favorite color: Blue”

 (Applications without this will not be considered.)

Quick Task Scenario (Required)

You are managing 5 client accounts. Two tasks are overdue, one tea
mber has not responded in 24 hours, and one client has a pending issue that could impact performance.



 In 3–5 bullet points, explain:

How you would prioritize these issues

What actions you would take first

How you would ensure nothing falls behind



Experience Summary

Briefly describe any experience managing tasks, teams, or workflows

Include any Local SEO or Google Maps experience (if applicable)

Confirm your availability and that you are comfortable with the hourly rate

title: Full-Time Professional Video Editor (eCommerce & Retail)
description:
About Us



We are an aggressively growing eCommerce and Retail brand looking for a highly skilled Video Editor Professional to join our creative team full-time. We move fast, innovate daily, and are looking for a driven creative who wants to grow with a brand that is scaling quickly.



The Role



As our full-time Video Editor, you will be the driving force behind our visual content. You will be responsible for creating high-converting video ads, engaging social media content, and polished product showcases.



Critical Requirement: We rely heavily on bringing our high-quality product photography to life. A crucial part of this role requires the ability to take static images and creatively transform them into dynamic, engaging videos by animating, panning, and simulating different camera angles (parallax effects, 3D camera movements) from still images.



Key Responsibilities



Image-to-Video Animation: Masterfully create dynamic, high-converting video content using 2D/3D animation techniques, simulated camera angles, and motion graphics extracted purely from static product images.

Edit and produce scalable video content tailored for eCommerce platforms and social media (TikTok, Instagram Reels,
 Ads, and YouTube).

Create multiple hooks and variations of video ads for A/B testing.

Apply seamless transitions, color grading, sound design, trending audio, and text overlays/captions to maximize viewer retention.

Collaborate daily with our creative team to brainstorm, storyboard, and execute campaigns from concept to final render.

Qualifications & Requirements

Proven experience as a Video Editor, preferably with experience creating content for eCommerce or retail brands.

Mandatory Portfolio Requirement: You must provide examples of videos you have created primarily using still images with dynamic angles and simulated camera movements.

Advanced proficiency in industry-standard software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).

Deep understanding of social media algorithms, pacing, and what drives e-commerce conversions.

Ability to work full-time, handle multiple projects at once, and deliver assets on tight deadlines.



How to Apply

If you have a keen eye for eCommerce trends and are incredibly talented at breathing dynamic life into still images, we want you on our team!



Please apply by sending the following:



A brief introduction about your experience with eCommerce video editing.

Your portfolio or demo reel (Please explicitly point out or link to a specific example where you created a video using different angles of images).

Your expected full-time monthly salary or hourly rate.

Include the word "Scale" in the first line of your application so we know you read this entire post.

Let me know if you would like me to add any specific software requirements (like specifically asking for After Effects) or if you want to emphasize any particular social media platforms!

title: Video Editor & Content Manager — Precision Auto Detailing
description:
About the Company

Precision Auto Detailing is a fast-growing mobile car detailing business based in California, USA. We're scaling our brand through social media and paid ads, and we're building a long-term remote team. This is a stable, long-term opportunity with a US business owner who values good work and rewards top performers with raises and bonuses.

The Role

We're looking for a skilled Filipino video editor and content manager to take full ownership of our short-form video content. You will edit our business reels, create high-converting ads for
 and Instagram, and manage our content calendar across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and
.

We also want someone tech-savvy who can use AI tools like Claude, Claude Code, and Higgsfield AI to supercharge content creation — from research and scriptwriting to AI-generated cinematic video effects, motion, and visual storytelling.

Responsibilities



Edit short-form reels and ads using Adobe Premiere Pro and CapCut (high-level editing: color grading, sound design, transitions, captions, motion graphics)

Use Higgsfield AI (or similar AI video tools like Runway, Kling, Sora) to create cinematic effects, camera motion, AI b-roll, and next-level visual storytelling for ads and reels

Build and manage an AI content agent using Claude / Claude Code for content research, trend monitoring, and script generation

Create scroll-stopping hooks and before/after transformation videos for car detailing content

Plan and manage the weekly content calendar

Edit paid ad creatives for Meta Ads and Google Ads, and iterate based on performance data

Organize raw footage, project files, and final exports in a clean system

Post and schedule content across Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts



Requirements



Strong English communication (written and spoken)

2+ years of video editing experience with a portfolio of reels, ads, or short-form content

Expert skills in Adobe Premiere Pro AND CapCut (After Effects is a plus)

Experience with AI video tools like Higgsfield AI, Runway, Kling, Pika, or Sora

Experience using AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT for content workflows

Willingness to learn Claude Code to build simple automations and agents (training provided if needed)

Strong understanding of short-form content: hooks, pacing, retention, captions, CTAs

Reliable high-speed internet and a computer capable of running Premiere Pro smoothly

Self-starter who can work independently, meet deadlines, and take ownership

Bonus: experience with US brands, automotive content, or Meta/Google ads



What We Offer



Competitive USD salary (based on experience and skill level)

Performance bonuses tied to content output and ad results

Long-term, stable position with a growing US company

Paid time off after probation period

Room to grow into a lead creative role as we scale



How to Apply

Please send the following when you apply:



Your portfolio / showreel (3–5 best video edits)

A short Loom or video intro (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself in English

One example of how you've used AI (Claude, ChatGPT, Higgsfield, Runway, etc.) in your content workflow

Your expected monthly salary in USD and availability (hours per week, timezone overlap)

title: Sales Representative

We specialize in risk assessments, vulnerability management, and managed security services.



We are looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Sales Development Representative (SDR) to engage with inbound and outbound leads, book qualified meetings, and support our sales pipeline.



Role Overview



As an SDR, you will be responsible for engaging leads generated through cold
 campaigns (Prospi) and LinkedIn outreach (Ottomatey), qualifying prospects, and booking appointments for our sales team. You will also manage follow-ups to ensure no opportunity is missed.



This role is critical to driving revenue growth and requires strong communication, persistence, and organization.



Key Responsibilities

Respond promptly to leads generated from:

Cold
 campaigns (Prospi platform)

LinkedIn outreach (Ottomatey platform)

Qualify prospects based on defined criteria (industry, role, need, timing)

Book discovery calls and meetings for the CEO/sales team

Conduct structured follow-ups via
 and LinkedIn messaging
