Track conversations and ensure consistent pipeline movement

Re-engage cold or unresponsive leads using follow-up sequences

Collaborate with leadership to improve messaging and conversion rates



Required Skills & Experience

Proven experience as an SDR, appointment setter, or lead generation specialist

Strong written English communication skills (very important)

Experience with cold outreach and follow-ups

Familiarity with LinkedIn outreach tools and
 automation platforms

Self-motivated, reliable, and results-driven



Preferred Experience

Experience using tools like:

LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Outreach automation tools (like Ottomatey or similar)

 sequencing tools (like Prospi, Instantly, Smartlead, etc.)

CRM systems (GHL)

Experience in B2B, SaaS, or cybersecurity industries



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Number of meetings booked per week

Response time to inbound leads

Follow-up consistency and conversion rates

Lead-to-meeting conversion rate



Compensation

Base pay (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses per qualified meeting booked

Potential for long-term growth within the company



What We’re Looking For

Someone who follows up relentlessly but professionally

Strong attention to detail and ability to track conversations

A proactive communicator who doesn’t wait for instructions

A team player who wants to grow with the company

description:

title: Swimming Coach
description:
Job Title: Swimming Coach (Full-Time/Part-Time)



Location: Metro Manila Public Pools & Home Pools (Areas include Pasay, Makati, Las Pinas, Quezon City, and surrounding areas)



Job Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Fixed Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM or Flexible Schedule with a minimum of 4 hours per day)



Job Description:

We Management OPC, under Project Swim, is seeking enthusiastic and confident individuals to join our team as Swimming Tutors. This role is open to both full-time and part-time candidates who have a passion for swimming and enjoy working with people of all skill levels. Whether you prefer a fixed schedule (8 AM - 5 PM) or a flexible schedule with a minimum of 4 hours per day, we offer opportunities that fit your availability. You will work at various locations, including Cebu public pools or clients’ home pools in areas around Manila.



Responsibilities:

-Conduct swimming lessons for individuals or groups.



-Ensure the safety of all students during lessons, maintaining a watchful eye and adhering to safety protocols.



-Motivate and guide students to develop confidence and improve their swimming abilities.



-Assist in setting up and maintaining training equipment and pool facilities.



-Provide progress reports and feedback to students and/or their guardians.



-Maintain a professional, friendly, and supportive environment for all students.



-Adapt teaching methods based on individual student needs and progress.



Requirements:

-Confidence in swimming and a positive attitude towards teaching others.



-Good communication skills in English or Filipino.



-Willingness to undergo training to enhance teaching skills and swimming techniques.



-Ability to work around different locations (Metro Manila public pools or client home pools).



-Flexibility in work schedule, with options for both fixed hours (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM) and flexible timing (minimum 4 hours per day).



Preferred Qualifications:

-Experience as a varsity swimmer or involvement in competitive swimming.



-Educational background in BSED (Bachelor of Secondary Education) or related fields is a plus.



-Previous experience in coaching, teaching, or working with any individual.



Benefits:

-Competitive compensation based on experience and availability.



-Opportunity for professional growth and development through training and certification programs.



-Flexible work hours that accommodate your schedule.



-Dynamic work environment, engaging with clients in various locations around Pangasinan.



If you have a passion for swimming and are eager to inspire others while developing your own skills, we encourage you to apply and become part of our growing team! Praying things will go well and God bless!

title: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner
description:
Job Requisition: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner

Position: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner (US Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: 40 hours per week, Monday – Friday. Must be available to work within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Pacific Standard Time (PST), which is 12:00 AM (Midnight) – 10:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT).



Compensation: 40,000 – 55,000 PHP / month (Depending on experience)



We are a premier Virtual Assistant and AI agency dedicated to pairing world-class talent with top-performing businesses. We believe in empowering our tea
mbers, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and delivering unmatched operational excellence to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an elite Virtual Operations Partner to own the operational movement of our clients' real estate businesses. Your core objective is to create predictable, scalable operations by managing transaction coordination, listing management, marketing execution, and CRM integrity. You will ensure that no contingency expires unnoticed, no deadline is missed, and the agent’s time is concentrated on revenue-generating activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Transaction & Listing Control

Contract-to-Close Management: Track timelines, monitor contingencies, coordinate inspections/appraisals, and communicate with escrow to ensure seamless closings.

Listing Management: Execute pre-listing checklists, schedule photographers, coordinate staging, ensure MLS data accuracy, and set up showing instructions. Listings must be launched organized and correctly positioned.

Buyer Workflow: Coordinate offer preparation, organize disclosure packets, set up timeline calendars, and track closing checklists.



Marketing & Database Management

Marketing Execution: Support digital presence via Canva graphic design, social media scheduling, SEO/SEM strategies,
 campaign deployment, and open house material preparation. Brand presentation must remain consistent and error-free.

CRM Integrity: Maintain contact entry accuracy, segment databases, log transactions, create follow-up tasks, and generate pipeline reports.



Communication: Ensure all written communication is clear, structured, and timely. Proactively update clients and vendors on current status, required actions, and timeline impacts.

Daily Operational Rhythm



Start of Day: Review all active transactions, confirm deadlines within 7 days, and identify risk points.

Midday: Follow up on inspections, escrow, and lenders; update the CRM; and confirm vendor timelines.

End of Day: Document transaction progress, prepare next-day priorities, and flag any compliance or risk items.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant, Transaction Coordinator, or Operations Manager, with a mandatory focus on the US Real Estate industry.

Language: Exceptional, highly proficient English skills. Ability to write persuasive, error-free copy and professional transaction updates for an American audience.



Technical Skills: Proven expertise in real estate CRMs, MLS platforms, and transaction management software. Strong proficiency in Canva and foundational SEO/SEM.

Systemization: Ability to build and maintain listing checklist templates, buyer workflows, vendor contact lists, and compliance tracking forms.



Work-From-Home Infrastructure Requirements

Audio Equipment: A high-quality, professional-grade noise-canceling headset is mandatory.

Internet: Access to fast, reliable fiber-optic internet (minimum 50 Mbps) AND a reliable backup internet source.

Power: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or backup generator to ensure zero downtime.

Environment: A dedicated, quiet workspace free from household distractions.

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant (ServiceM8 & Trade Administration)
description:
About Us

We are a premium landscaping and property maintenance company based in Bayside, Melbourne, Australia. We cater to high-end residential clients and top-tier Real Estate agencies. We are currently scaling our operations, and we are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to take the wheel.



The Role

We don’t need someone to just answer
s; we need an operational partner. You will be managing our "Engine Room" - building accurate quotes, coordinating with property managers, and ensuring our field team has exactly what they need on-site. You will start at 15–20 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into a full-time operations role as the business scales.





Your Daily & Weekly Tasks

- Quoting & Invoicing (ServiceM8): Building professional, highly accurate quotes using our established material "bundles" and recipes.

- Data Management (QuickBooks Online): Updating material costs and ensuring supplier invoices are correctly categorized.

- Scheduling & Logistics: Dispatching jobs to the field team, coordinating skip bin deliveries, and managing sub-contractor calendars.

- Inbox Management: Handling client inquiries and filtering the noise so the CEO can focus on site work.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- Extreme Attention to Detail: A misplaced decimal point on a paving quote costs us money. You must be meticulous with numbers.

- Flawless English (C1/C2 Level): You will be communicating directly with high-net-worth clients and professional property managers.

- Tech Savvy: Previous experience with ServiceM8, Tradify, Xero, or QuickBooks Online is a massive advantage.

- Timezone Overlap: You must be available to work at least 3 hours per day during Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST) morning hours.



How to Apply (Read Carefully)

We move fast and value attention to detail above all else. If you do not follow these instructions, your application will be immediately deleted.





To apply, please reply to this posting and change the subject line to read exactly: Bayside Premium Admin - Joe Collins-Graham.



In your message, please include:



A 2–3 sentence summary of your experience with trade software (like ServiceM8) or quoting/estimating.



Confirmation that you are comfortable starting on a part-time basis (15–20 hours/week).

title: Experienced Associate Brand Manager to support 12+ Amazon brands for growth, execution, drive performance and operation
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Digital Marketing Strategist
description:
**High-Level Marketing Strategist (Performance Marketing Agency)**  

**Not a VA, creative, or media buying role.**



We need a sharp strategist who owns the full marketing system - from ad angles and offers to funnels, lead forms, conversion flow, and follow-up logic.



You’ll work directly with our founders, media buyer, creative designer, and occasionally clients. Your job is to diagnose problems and improve results across the entire customer journey for SaaS and e-commerce brands.



**What you’ll do:**

- Develop marketing angles, campaign concepts, and testing hypotheses

- Turn competitor & market insights into clear strategic direction

- Shape offers, messaging, and funnel positioning

- Connect ads to the right funnel stage and customer awareness level

- Review performance data with the media buyer and d
 what to test next

- Give the creative designer clear strategic briefs

- Analyze funnels, spot drop-offs, and fix lead quality or conversion issues

- Review campaigns before launch and translate data into actionable plans



**This role is for you if:**

- You think in full marketing systems (not just ads or creatives)

- You can diagnose whether the problem is the ad, offer, landing page, lead form, or follow-up

- You’re proactive, independent, and obsessed with business results

- You have strong experience in marketing strategy, funnel strategy, offer positioning, messaging, direct-response, and conversion analysis



**Strong bonus:** SaaS/B2B lead gen, e-commerce direct response, Meta ads, sales funnels, or WhatsApp follow-up flows.



**Who is NOT a fit:**

- Graphic designers, copywriters, or media buyers only

- People who need step-by-step instructions

- Anyone who just says “test more creatives” without deeper strategy



**Pay:** $9–$14/hour DPE  

**Hours:** Flexible, long-term partnership



**To apply, send a message with:**

1. Your best 3 examples of relevant work

2. A short explanation of a funnel or marketing problem you diagnosed and fixed

3. Your answers to these two questions:  

   - If a campaign gets clicks but poor lead quality, what are the first 3 things you check and why?  

   - How do you d
 whether a problem comes from the ad, the offer, the landing page, the lead form, or the follow-up?



**Put the words “Blue Funnel” in the first line of your application.**



Applications without detailed answers will be ignored.

description:
WHO WE ARE



OptiME Health (
) is a women's telehealth company built around one mission: helping women break the cycle of generational weight struggles for good. We combine GLP-1 therapy, clinical care, nutrition, fitness coaching, and the proprietary OptiME Method into one transformative program. We are founder-led, early-stage, and growing with intention.



This is not a job listing for a seat filler. We are building something real, and we are looking for someone who wants to grow inside it,  long term.

---

THE ROLE

You will own OptiME Health's entire social media presence. That means strategy, creation, editing, scheduling, analytics, and iteration....all of it. You will work directly with our founder and be expected to bring your own ideas, push creative boundaries, and execute at a high standard every week.



Platforms you will manage:

- Instagram (Reels, Stories, Feed)

- TikTok

- YouTube (long-form and Shorts)

-

- X 
)

- Podcast clip editing and distribution



What you will do:

- Develop and execute a platform-specific social media strategy

- Create, film-ready, and edit video content across all formats

- Build and manage a publishing calendar

- Stay ahead of trends....research before they peak, not after

- Track analytics and make data-driven decisions without being asked

- Edit podcast content into shareable social clips

- Write captions and copy that sounds human and connects with real women

- Collaborate directly with founder - openly, honestly, and productively

---

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

The single most important qualities we are hiring for:

1. Willingness to learn: You study the platforms, the trends, and your own work constantly. You never assume you have it figured out.



2. Adaptability: Algorithms change. Trends die. Strategies stop working. You pivot without drama and find a better path forward.



3. Relentless problem-solving: When something is not working, you do not wait for permission to fix it. You bring solutions, not just problems.



Skills and experience we want to see:

- Video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Content creation across at least 2–3 major social platforms

- Graphic design (Canva or equivalent)

- Platform algorithm literacy: you understand why content performs or fails

- Podcast editing is a strong plus (Descript, Audacity, or similar)

- Strong written English - your captions need to land with American women

---



THE CULTURE: READ THIS CAREFULLY

We are a small, founder-led team. That means you will have a direct relationship with leadership, real creative ownership, and genuine room to grow. It also means we have high expectations and we hold each other to them.



We welcome pushback. If you disagree with a direction, say so. Bring your perspective. That is part of what makes a team better. Autonomy and accountability is critical.  WIlingness to learn and innovate.  You are required to read/listen to the Brand Story 2.0 by Donald Miller.  There will be future learning, so you must be comfortable learning, listening or reading books, research to continuously improve.  



What we will not work with: someone who pushes back but refuses to listen in return. Finding a middle ground requires two people who are both willing to hear each other out. If your way is always the only way, this is not the right role for you.



What we are building toward: a long-term working relationship. The person who joins now and grows with us will have opportunities that someone hired two years from now will not. We take that seriously, and we expect you to as well.

---

SKILLS TEST — REQUIRED BEFORE INTERVIEW

Before we schedule a call with anyone, we ask every finalist to complete a short skills test. This is not optional , it is how we evaluate whether the right person is behind the right application.



The simple test:

CONTENT STRATEGY (written, ~30 minutes)

You are launching OptiME Health's TikTok from scratch. We have zero followers. Our audience is women aged 28–52 who have struggled with their weight for years and are tired of solutions that do not work.



Answer the following:

a) What are the first 3 content pillars you would build around, and why?

b) Describe 3 specific video concepts — one for each pillar — that you would post in the first two weeks.

c) How would you measure whether your strategy is working after 30 days?



Submit your answers in writing. No more than one page. Clarity matters more than length.

---

HOW TO APPLY



Send everything to: 

Subject line: OptiME Social Media Strategist — [Your Name]



Your application must include:

1. A video introduction (2–3 minutes) — tell us who you are and why this role. Show your personality. No script, no reading off a paper. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



2. Links to 2–3 pieces of content you created or managed — any platform.



3. Your resume or a brief experience summary.



4. Answer this one question in writing: What is one thing most health and wellness brands consistently get wrong on social media, and how would you fix it?



Shortlisted candidates will be sent the Part 2 video file to complete the full skills test. We will communicate clearly and promptly at every step.



We read every application. We respond to the ones that show us you mean it.

title: Marketing Operations & Growth Virtual Assistant (Health & Wellness / Telehealth Brand)
description:

We deliver high-touch, evidence-based programs that combine GLP-1 therapies, nutrition systems, movement, and behavioral coaching. Adding hormones and peptides in future. 



We are scaling rapidly and are seeking a high-performing Marketing Operations VA to replace a former agency and take ownership of execution across all marketing channels.



This is not a beginner role. We are looking for someone who can think, execute, organize, and improve systems.



Role Overview



You will function as the central marketing execution lead, supporting the Founder directly. You will manage and execute the same responsibilities previously handled by a marketing agency, including content, campaigns, systems, analytics, and coordination.



You must be organized, proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable with accountability.

Weight loss programs

Promotions & bonuses

Coordinate landing pages,
s, and social posts

 campaigns (welcome sequences, promotions, education)

Manage
 lists, tagging, and basic segmentation

4. Website, Funnel & Asset Management

5. Analytics, Reporting & Optimization



Track KPIs: leads, conversions, engagement,
 open rates

6. Systems, SOPs & Organization

Required Skills & Experience

Experience with:

 platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, GoHighLevel, or similar)

Work Schedule & Compensation

Performance-based raises available

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Who This Role Is NOT For

How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Applications Without This Will Be Ignored)

Please include the following in your application:

Subject line or first sentence must include the phrase:

Final Note

This role is for someone who wants to grow with a brand, not just complete tasks. If you are organized, creative, and execution-driven and want to be part of a premium, mission-driven health company, this will be a strong long-term opportunity.

title: Assistant Operations Manager - Remote| Singapore Company

title: ASSISTANT OPERATIONS MANAGER – CLIENT EXPERIENCE (Female only, Full-Time, Remote – Philippines)

title: Content Creator & Copywriter
description:
Content Creator & Copywriter — RuleInside

Remote · $880/month ($5.00/h) · Full-time (8h/day · 22 days/month)



WHO WE ARE



RuleInside is an AI startup that deploys and operates AI voice agents for WordPress ecommerce stores (WooCommerce, FluentCart, SureCart) in Italy, Spain and the US. Our agents handle inbound support, outbound cart recovery, post-purchase follow-up and database reactivation — fully managed by us, 24/7, without the store owner touching a single setting.



I'm building my first remote team and looking for a content operator to own the full content and lead generation system for both my personal brand (Stefano Bertoli) and the company brand (RuleInside).



THE MODEL



We produce 3 short videos per week — two personal brand videos (me on camera) and one company brand video (AI avatar via HeyGen). Each video is distributed identically across all platforms with a "Comment X to get Y" engagement hook that feeds ManyChat DM automation to capture leads. The best performing clip runs as a Meta Ad.



Reference channels for content style:



- 
/aitrendz.xyz1 and x.com/aitrendz_xyz (René Remsik — AI tools education)

- x.com/nateherk and 
 (personal brand, X threads)



THE ROLE



You own the entire content and lead generation operation. You script, produce, edit, distribute, automate and report — everything from the first draft to the Meta Ad going live. You work remotely and async with the founder using Claude AI, HeyGen, ManyChat and CapCut as your core stack.



This is a full-time remote position (8 hours/day, 22 days/month).



CONTENT CLUSTERS



All content maps to one of six clusters:



1. Ecommerce Revenue — lost carts, unanswered questions, dormant buyers. Top of funnel, highest reach.

2. AI for Ecommerce — tool demos, trends, what works. Education + positioning. René Remsik model.

3. Managed vs DIY — why 80% of AI projects fail. Why store owners can't configure their own agents. Category defining.

4. WordPress Ecommerce — WooCommerce owners are ignored by Shopify-first AI tools. RuleInside is built for them.

5. Founder Story — building RuleInside from scratch. The failure, the consulting years, why now. Personal, raw, on camera.

6. Results & Case Studies — real numbers, real revenue. Conversion content. Added once client data is available.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Video Production (priority #1)



- Script my two weekly personal brand videos — I record from your script (60–90s, on camera)

- Produce weekly AI avatar video autonomously using HeyGen (company brand)

- Edit all three videos: captions, cuts, music, branding, hooks

- Distribute the same clip across TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts,
 Reels, LinkedIn video, X video

- Write platform-specific captions with "Comment X to get Y" engagement hooks

- Stay current with short-form video trends and formats



Lead Generation & DM Automation (priority #2)



- Set up and manage ManyChat automation flows on Instagram and

- Configure comment-triggered DM sequences that capture leads

- Write DM copy that converts comment engagement into
 subscribers or booked discovery calls

- Connect lead flow into
 sequences via Brevo or Mailchimp

- Monitor and optimise automation performance weekly



Meta Ads (priority #3)



- Identify best performing organic clips and run as paid video ads

- Create static single image ad creatives in Canva

- Create carousel ads in Canva

- Write ad copy for all formats across the full funnel

- A/B test creatives, copy and audiences

- Report weekly on ad performance and optimise



Supporting Content



- X threads (3x/week — key points from video content)

- LinkedIn text posts (3x/week)

- Blog post (2x/week — from video transcript, expanded)

- Weekly newsletter to captured leads

- Landing pages for specific campaigns

- Lead magnets: PDF guides, checklists



Reporting & Strategy



- Weekly performance report (views, reach, leads captured, DM conversion rate, ad spend vs results)

- Monthly content calendar aligned to the 6 content clusters

- A/B testing across formats, hooks, captions and CTAs

- Competitor and trend monitoring



WEEKLY RHYTHM



Monday



- Script both personal brand videos

- Plan HeyGen avatar video — topic, script, visuals

- Write blog post #1

- Competitor and trend monitoring

- Content calendar planning for the week

- Write DM copy for ManyChat flows



Tuesday



- I record both personal videos and send you the raw footage

- Produce HeyGen avatar video

- Write blog post #2

- Write ad copy for Meta Ads — all formats

- Create Canva ad creatives — single image ads



Wednesday



- Edit all three videos — captions, cuts, music, branding, hooks

- Create Canva carousel ads

- A/B testing review — creatives, copy, audiences

- Monitor and optimise ManyChat automation performance



Thursday



- Cut all platform derivatives — TikTok, Reels, Shorts, LinkedIn,
, X

- Write all captions and hooks for every platform

- Write X threads (3x)

- Write LinkedIn text posts (3x)

- Weekly performance report — views, reach, leads, DM conversion, ad spend



Friday



- Schedule everything across all platforms

- Update ManyChat flows

- Update and optimise Meta Ads

- Send weekly newsletter

- Work on lead magnets and landing pages

- Technical documentation — client guides, FAQs, knowledge base



HOW YOU WORK



You use Claude AI to write faster. HeyGen for avatar video. CapCut or similar for editing. ManyChat for DM automation. Canva for ad creatives. You are not a manual writer or traditional editor — you are an AI-powered content operator who runs the full system.



REQUIREMENTS



Experience



- 1+ years in content creation, social media or digital marketing

- Proven experience with short-form video production (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

- Hands-on experience with ManyChat — comment triggers, DM flows, lead capture

- Experience running Meta Ads — creative testing, audience setup, performance reporting

- B2B or SaaS background preferred



Tools



- ManyChat — comment-to-DM automation, lead capture flows, sequence setup

- HeyGen or similar — AI avatar video production

- CapCut or similar — short-form video editing

- Meta Ads Manager — campaign setup, creative testing, reporting

- Canva intermediate/advanced — ad creatives, carousels, brand-consistent graphics

- Claude AI or similar LLM — daily use for scripting and copy

-
 marketing platform (Brevo, Mailchimp or similar)

- Basic SEO knowledge for blog posts



Who you are



- Serious and committed — you treat this as a professional engagement, not a side project

- Systems thinker — you build repeatable workflows, not one-off pieces

- Proactive — you bring ideas, spot opportunities, flag problems early

- Fast learner — our product is technical (AI voice agents for ecommerce) and you'll pick it up quickly

- Detail-oriented — hooks, captions and DM copy have to be tight

- Fluent English — written and spoken, non-negotiable

- Organized — you run a multi-platform operation without dropping the ball



PRACTICAL DETAILS



Location: Remote

Platform: OnlineJobs.ph

Salary: $880/month ($5.00/h)

Salary review: Every 6 months based on performance and commitment

Contract: Monthly, ongoing

Hours: Full-time · 8 hours/day · 22 days/month

Schedule: Flexible — async with agreed daily overlap window

Start: As soon as possible



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, start your message with the word RULEINSIDE and answer this question before anything else:



"What are the 3 content priorities in this role and name one of the reference channels we use for content style."



Applications that do not start with RULEINSIDE and do not answer this question will not be reviewed.



---



Before scheduling a call, I have a few questions:



Role confirmation



- Have you seen the tasks described in the job posting above — video production, DM automation, Meta Ads, social media, copy and analytics? This is a demanding role that requires managing multiple workstreams in parallel from day one.

- Important note: I am currently the only member of the team. You would be the first person to join, which means real autonomy but also full ownership of the content operation from the start.

- Do you confirm you feel comfortable taking on this full scope in this context?



Availability



- Are you currently working?

- Can you dedicate full-time hours to this project from the start on a permanent basis?

- Do you have other active clients or projects at the 
nt?



One last important question:



This is my first team. The first few months will involve a lot to define and build. What would you need fro
 to make this work long-term?



If everything sounds like a good fit, I would love to have a 30-minute call this week. When are you available?



WHY JOIN US



RuleInside is at an early stage — you won't be joining an established team with fixed processes. You will be building the content and lead generation operation from scratch alongside the founder, learning how AI products work in practice, and growing with the company.



If you want a stable monthly salary, full remote flexibility and real ownership of a complete content system — this is the right position.



Questions? Send me a message on OnlineJobs.ph.

Your writing sounds AI, flat, and cringy

Flexible hours (20–40 hrs/week) 



Performance-based bonuses over time

100% Remote



Application Process

Note

We are not looking for generic social media managers.

We are looking for someone who understands 
 and can contribute to it naturally.

title: Creative Content & Social Media Assistant
description:
Creative Content & Social Media Assistant (Full-Time, Remote)

We are a European digital studio dedicated to creating environments where stories can live. Currently, we are focused on building Lunebi, a premium, ad-free mobile app that helps busy parents maintain magical, uninterrupted evening routines with their children.



We are looking for someone who is completely at home in the digital world. In the past, we hired people who were great at blindly following instructions, but they lacked a "feel" for the brand. We don't just want a robot, but we do need someone who can follow the rules. We need a highly self-sufficient, creative problem-solver who deeply understands our mission, has a strong aesthetic eye, and can meticulously execute our workflows.



WHY THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT



Growth Partner: We aren't just looking for an employee; we are looking for a long-term partner. As our startup scales and succeeds, your role, responsibilities, and salary will grow right alongside us.



We Pay Weekly: You get paid $125 USD every Friday. We believe in reliable cash flow for our team.



Autonomy & Respect: We do not micromanage. We will give you structured Step-by-Step Video Guides (SOPs) for the basics, but we expect you to take initiative, use your own judgment, and figure things out when a guide doesn't cover everything.



No "Probationary" Pay Cut: We respect your time and pay the full professional salary from Day 1.



We Pay for Tests: If we ask you to complete a trial task during the hiring process, we pay you for it.



THE ROLE

You will be the creative operational engine behind our brand's online presence.



Content & Video Creation: Using the newest digital and AI tools to generate a wide mix of content. Especially in these early days, you will need to balance creating fast-paced, engaging videos for TikTok/Reels with curating a calming, aesthetic "safe-space" vibe for our Instagram and Pinterest.



Social Media & Community Management: Coming up with fresh, engaging ideas and using modern AI tools (like ChatGPT or Gemini) to bring those ideas to life. You will manage our social profiles and actively reply to comments from parents in a highly empathetic tone.



Following Guides (SOPs): While we value your creative input, we also have proven processes. It is absolutely critical that you can simply and meticulously follow our structured, step-by-step video guides when they are provided.



Independent Problem Solving: You will be working while our European founders might be offline. If you get stuck, you don't just stop and wait for hours. You Google it, you test a workaround, and you keep moving forward.



REQUIREMENTS (Please read carefully)



Impeccable Written English: Because you will be writing posts and replying directly to our community of parents, your written English must be fluent, natural, and capable of holding a warm, empathetic tone.



The "Digital Native": You are extremely comfortable with the latest tech tools. You don't get lost in new software interfaces. You adapt quickly.



Detail-Oriented & Creative: You understand what makes a social media post look good across different platforms, but you are also disciplined enough to follow exact instructions without missing a step.



Self-Sufficient: You know how to troubleshoot and act independently when your manager is unavailable.



Full-Time Focus: You must NOT have another full-time job or be a full-time university student. We require your exclusive professional focus for 40 hours per week.



Professional Setup: You must have a working laptop, a stable primary internet connection, and a reliable backup internet plan (e.g., mobile data hotspot) for emergencies.



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE



Salary: $500 USD / Month (Paid out as $125 Weekly).



Raise Potential: Performance review after Month 3 with the potential to increase to $600/month. As a partner in our growth, further raises will align with the company's success.



13th Month Pay: Included for long-term staff.



Holidays: You will follow standard Philippine national holidays.



Schedule: Flexible 8-hour shifts, but you must overlap 4 hours of your shift with European mornings (approximately 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM Philippine Time).



HOW TO APPLY

Please reply to this posting with the exact subject line "Creative Digital Native" and include a short introduction about yourself.



Then, answer these 3 specific questions:



Your Taste & Experience: What is your experience with coming up with social media ideas and using modern/AI tools to execute them across platforms like TikTok, Instagram, or Pinterest? (Please link 1 or 2 examples of visual content you like or have created).



Problem Solving: Imagine you are working on an urgent video, but the software you normally use is completely down and I am asleep so you cannot ask me what to do. What is your exact step-by-step reaction?



Logistics: Can you confirm you do not have another job/university classes, and can you provide a Speedtest.net link + confirm your backup internet method?

title: AI Automation Specialist (WhatsApp & Chat Automation)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring a solid AI Automation Specialist to own and maintain our AI-powered WhatsApp and chat automation system.



This role focuses on designing, maintaining, and optimising AI-assisted chat workflows that handle customer enquiries, bookings, and routing — replacing and supporting human customer service operations.



This is not a software engineering role and not AI research.

It is a logic-driven automation and operations role.



What You Will Do



You will be the primary owner of our AI chat automation.



Core Responsibilities



Design and maintain chat automation workflows



Configure AI responses, prompts, and guardrails



Build multi-step logic for enquiries, bookings, and routing



Handle intent detection and escalation to human agents



Test edge cases (unclear intent, wrong info, user changes mind)



Monitor live conversations and optimise performance



Maintain clear documentation of workflows and rules



You Will NOT



Write backend or frontend code



Train AI models



Build websites or mobile apps



Do machine learning or data science



Required Skills (Must-Have)



We are looking for someone solid and experienced, not entry-level.



You should have experience in some of the following:



WhatsApp or chat automation platforms



Chatbot or CRM automation workflows



Designing logic-based conversation flows



Prompt writing with clear rules and boundaries



Handling human handover and exception cases



Strong logical thinking and attention to detail



Good documentation habits



Nice to Have (Not Mandatory)



Experience with automation tools (Zapier, Make, etc.)



Basic understanding of webhooks or APIs



Experience supporting or replacing customer service teams



Operations or process-improvement background



What We Care About (Very Important)



We care more about thinking and reliability than buzzwords.



You should be able to explain:



What an AI chat should do when it is unsure



When automation should stop and escalate to a human



How to prevent wrong replies or wrong bookings



Salary & Work Arrangement



Salary: USD 800– 1,000 / month (based on experience)



Location: Philippines (remote, home-based)



Working hours: Aligned with Singapore time (GMT+8)



Employment: Full-time, long-term



Why This Role Is Different



You own the automation logic



Your work directly impacts operations and revenue



Stable, long-term role (not freelance or project-based)



Clear scope — no random tech tasks



Application Instructions (Mandatory)



To apply, please include:



A short description of your experience with chat or workflow automation



ONE example of a workflow you built

(describe the logic and decision flow, no screenshots needed)



Answer this question:

“What should an AI chat do when it does not fully understand the user’s intent?”



Applications that do not follow the above will not be considered.



Final Note (Filters the Right Candidates)



This role is not for beginners and not for programmers.

It is for someone who enjoys building reliable automation systems and thinking through real-world customer scenarios.

title: AI Automation Engineer (Conversational Systems & WhatsApp Automation)
description:
About the role



bout the Role



We are building AI-driven conversational automation systems where AI directly impacts operations and conversion.



This role owns the design, implementation, and reliability of our AI chat automation across WhatsApp and messaging channels, using workflow logic, LLMs, and system integrations.



This is not an experimental or research role.

Lead qualification



Booking & scheduling



Pricing & service selection



Human handover

Ensure conversations are efficient, clear, and conversion-focused



2. AI Prompt & Knowledge-Base Engineering



Write strict system prompts to prevent hallucination and invalid outputs



Design structured knowledge bases (tables, allowed values, forbidden fields)

AI call frequency



Token usage

Treat AI automation as mission-critical operational infrastructure



5. Continuous Improvement

Scale proven flows across multiple business units



Required Skills & Experience (Must-Have)



Experience building chat or workflow-based automation systems



Strong understanding of conversational flow design



Practical experience deploying LLMs in production



Ability to write controlled, deterministic prompts



Comfortable working with:



JSON



REST APIs



Webhooks



Strong logical thinking and structured problem-solving skills



Strongly Preferred (High Advantage)



Experience with WhatsApp automation or messaging platforms



Background in sales, customer service, or operational automation



Experience optimising AI usage for cost and performance



Python or Node.js



Experience owning systems where uptime and accuracy matter

title: Junior Meta Ads Media Buyer Needed (Full-Time, 100% Remote)
description:
WHO ARE WE?



We’re Nooro - a fast-growing app company operating alongside a highly profitable eCommerce business, doing over $100M per year. 





WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?



We need a Jr. Media Buyer to manage day-to-day campaign operations in our Meta ad account under the direction of our senior media buyer.



This is primarily a creative testing execution role. You will be inside Ads Manager daily building out new creative tests, launching ads, managing budgets, QA-ing everything before publish, and reporting on performance. Expect 90% of your time to be setting up and managing creative tests across client accounts.



HOW TO APPLY: If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form: 





RESPONSIBILITES



•    Build and launch new creative tests across multiple client accounts — new ad variations, copy iterations, hook tests, format tests (static, video, carousel, UGC), and angle tests



•    Structure creative tests properly within campaign architecture (CBO, ABO, ASC, Advantage+ Shopping) based on the testing framework set by the senior buyer



•    QA every ad before publish: UTM parameters, creative assets, copy, placements, audience targeting, conversion events, and tracking verification



•    Monitor Advantage+ Creative Enhancements and platform-level automation settings, applying the correct protocol per client and creative type



•    Execute daily budget adjustments, ad toggling, and bid changes based on performance thresholds



•    Pull and organize creative performance data for weekly reporting (ROAS, CPA, CPM, CTR, Thumbstop, Hold Rate) so winning and losing creatives are clearly identified



•    Flag anomalies: spend pacing issues, delivery problems, rejected ads, pixel firing errors



•    Communicate async via Slack with clear status updates, questions, and blockers







REQUIREMENTS



• 6+ months hands-on experience inside Meta Ads Manager (not boosted posts, not watching courses — actually building and managing campaigns)



• Understands campaign structures: CBO vs. ABO, broad vs. interest targeting, dynamic creative vs. standard ads



• Experience setting up creative tests and knows how to isolate variables (hook, angle, format, copy) without muddying results



• Familiar with Meta Pixel, CAPI, and event-based conversion tracking



• Can navigate Business Manager: ad accounts, pixels, product catalogs, partner access



• Detail-oriented — the kind of person who double-checks UTMs and preview links before anything goes live



• Reliable async communicator. PST working hours required.







NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



• Experience with DTC/ecommerce brands



• Basic understanding of landing page CRO and how it connects to ad performance



• Comfortable with Google Sheets and Power BI for data pulls and reporting





This is a straightforward execution role with clear systems and expectations. We value precision, speed, and reliability.





Apply ONLY if you're looking for a full-time role in the long run, not a quick gig.





HOW TO APPLY: If you believe we're the right fit, please fill in this form:

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Day Shift
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Short Form Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Virtual Assistant — Help Build a Growing UK Dance Business (Part-Time / Full time  Immediate Start)
description:
This isn't just another VA job — it's a chance to help build something big.



Dance Complex is a growing UK-based dance business expanding across multiple cities. We connect dance teachers with students and run dance workshops and classes through a network of local instructors and venues.



We need a sharp, organised, self-motivated VA to help us with the behind-the-scenes work — finding dance teachers, sourcing venues, and supporting our expansion into new cities. As the business grows, so will your role — with marketing and social media responsibilities on the horizon.



Immediate start — we're ready to go now.

What you'll be doing:



????Researching and finding dance teachers across UK cities (this is the #1 priority)

???? Reaching out to teachers and venues via
, phone, WhatsApp, and social media

???? Speaking directly with UK venues and teachers to check availability and build relationships

? Checking teacher availability for upcoming bookings

???? Building and maintaining teacher and venue databases in Google Sheets

???? General research and admin to support business expansion



What you'll grow into:



???? Marketing the business across social media

???? Creating and adapting marketing content (Canva, templates, campaigns)

???? Supporting new city launches

???? Eventually managing a small team as we scale



What you WON'T be doing:



No customer bookings or enquiries

No invoicing or payment chasing

No website updates or technical work



?? IMPORTANT — Spoken English requirement:

You will be speaking directly with UK venue managers and dance teachers by phone and WhatsApp. Your spoken English must be excellent — confident, natural, and professional. If you're not comfortable having a real conversation in English with a UK business contact, this role isn't the right fit.

What we're looking for:



Excellent spoken AND written English (this is the #1 requirement)

Strong research and organisational skills

Confident reaching out to new contacts by
, phone, and social media

Reliable internet and own computer

Available to start immediately

Bonus: social media skills,, interest in dance or events



Working hours: Starting at 3:00 PM PHT, Monday–Friday (4–5 hours/day to start).

Why this role is different:



You're not just doing admin — you're helping build a business from the ground up

Real opportunity to grow into a senior marketing and operations role

The right person could eventually manage a small team

Clear path to pay increases and expanded responsibilities

Be part of something exciting in the UK dance industry

Huge opportunity to grow with us as we scale nationwide



Rate: $2.50–$3.00/hour USD depending on experience, paid weekly . Performance review and pay increase after 90-day trial.

To apply, please:



Send a voice note or short video (1–2 minutes)  if you can and introducing yourself in English and telling us why you'd be great for this role

Find 3 dance teachers in Scarborough, UK — give me their name, dance style, and one contact detail for each (this is your mini test task)

Confirm you can start immediately and work from 3:00 PM PHT, Monday–Friday

title: [URGENT] Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist - EST TIMEZONE
description:
We are looking for a highly customer-focused Customer Success Manager / Product Specialist who will serve as the primary product expert for our platform. This role requires someone who deeply understands the product and can confidently guide customers through onboarding, product usage, troubleshooting, and best practices.



The ideal candidate is experienced in handling client relationships, answering product-related questions, conducting product demonstrations, and ensuring customers maximize the value of the platform. You will act as a trusted partner to customers by helping them successfully adopt the product while providing timely support and strategic guidance.



This role requires strong communication skills, product expertise, and the ability to manage customer concerns with professionalism and empathy.



Key Responsibilities



Customer Onboarding & Adoption

• Guide new customers through the onboarding process, ensuring a smooth and successful setup.

• Help clients understand product capabilities and best practices to accelerate adoption.

• Provide clear walkthroughs and training sessions to ensure customers can effectively use the platform.



Product Expertise & Customer Support

• Serve as the primary product expert and point of contact for customer questions.

• Provide timely support by diagnosing issues, answering inquiries, and guiding customers toward solutions.

• Maintain a strong understanding of product features, updates, and workflows to assist customers effectively.



Client Relationship Management

• Build strong, long-term relationships with customers and key stakeholders.

• Act as a trusted advisor by proactively identifying opportunities to improve the customer experience.

• Ensure customers feel supported and confident using the platform.



Product Demonstrations & Training

• Conduct product demos for new and existing clients.

• Provide guidance and recommendations based on client needs and use cases.

• Help customers understand how to best leverage the product for their workflows.



Customer Retention & Success

• Monitor customer health, engagement, and satisfaction.

• Proactively identify risks or potential issues and address them before they impact customer experience.

• Work closely with internal teams to ensure customer feedback is communicated and addressed.



Key Qualifications & Skills

Experience

• 3–5+ years of experience in Customer Success, Account Management, Client Support, or similar customer-facing roles.

• Proven experience managing and supporting clients in a SaaS or technology-driven environment is highly preferred.



Customer Handling Expertise

• Strong background in managing customer relationships and handling inquiries professionally.

• Ability to remain calm, solution-oriented, and empathetic when resolving customer concerns.



Communication Skills

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Comfortable presenting product features, running demos, and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.



Product & Technical Aptitude

• Ability to quickly become an expert in the platform and confidently support users.

• Comfortable troubleshooting workflows, product features, and user issues.



Problem-Solving & Empathy

• Strong analytical and critical thinking skills.

• Ability to understand customer pain points and provide practical, customer-focused solutions.



Typical Success Metrics (KPIs)

• Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)

• Net Promoter Score (NPS)

• Customer Retention Rate

• Product Adoption and Engagement

• Response and Resolution Time for Customer Support

title: Sourcing Specialist — Haircare & Skincare (Amazon FBA)
description:
We build and launch haircare and skincare products on Amazon. We need someone who can take a formulation brief and turn it into a vetted manufacturer, a sample, and a price we can work with.

What the job is:

You receive a product brief — ingredients, specs, packaging requirements — and you own everything from there. Finding the right contract manufacturer, getting quotes, evaluating samples, reviewing COAs, negotiating MOQs and pricing, and managing the supplier relationship through to first order.

You're right for this if you:



Have direct experience sourcing from cosmetic or personal care contract manufacturers — China, US, or both

Know how to read a COA and identify a problem with a sample

Have negotiated MOQs and pricing with manufacturers before

Can manage supplier communication independently without dropping balls

Understand lead times, packaging compatibility, stability basics

Have worked with or for an Amazon FBA brand, a cosmetic manufacturer, or a private label operation



What you won't be doing:

Managing Amazon listings, doing product research, or handling logistics. This role is purely supplier-side. Own it fully and own it well.

To apply:

Skip the generic application. Tell us:

Describe a product you've sourced from brief to first delivery. What was the product, where did you find the manufacturer, what problems came up, and how did you resolve them.

Specific. Real. That answer is your application.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.



Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.





How to Apply:



If you are ready to join Power Plus Systems, LLC, a well-established residential electrical contractor that values its tea
mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers



Power Plus Systems, LLC is an equal opportunity employer and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds to apply.



Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

title: Creative Content Assistant for Soft Feminine Luxury Brands & Social Media Agency
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a creative, detail-obsessed content assistant with a natural eye for soft feminine luxury aesthetics. 



You’ll be supporting content across three personal brands (Feminine Finance, Feminine Energy, Lifestyle & Golf), while also assisting with our growing Social Media Marketing Agency.



This role is perfect for someone who loves beautiful visuals, understands elevated branding, and wants to grow within a fast-scaling, creative environment.



Weekly Creative Output (~15 Hours)



You will be responsible for producing and refining content that feels intentional, elegant, and high-quality:



- 1 Long-Form Video (10–15 minutes)

(YouTube edit + thumbnail design)

- 2 Short-Form Clips

(Cut from long-form content for Reels/TikTok)

- 6 Short-Form Videos

(Editing provided raw footage into high-performing Reels/TikToks)

- 2 Static Posts

(Aesthetic quote-style content)

- 2 Educational Carousels

Aesthetic Curation

(Selecting refined audio, ensuring cohesive “soft luxury” visuals across all content)



Agency Support (~5 Hours)



- Assist in content creation for agency clients

- Adapt to different brand voices and visual directions

- Support with simple editing (video, captions, graphics) for client deliverables



Note: Weekly deliverables may shift based on priorities.



Who This Role Is For

This is for someone who doesn’t just edit content, you understand the feeling behind it.



- You naturally gravitate toward “clean girl,” minimalist, soft luxury aesthetics

- You notice the small details (fonts, spacing, color grading, flow)

- You can switch between feminine lifestyle content and polished business content seamlessly

- You are reliable, organized, and take ownership of your work

- You have your own setup and are proficient in:

CapCut and/or Adobe Premiere Pro

Canva



Growth Opportunity

This role has a clear path to full-time as the brand and agency continue to expand.

We’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not just complete tasks.



How to Apply



Please send the following:

- A short introduction + why you’re a strong fit

- Your portfolio

(Video + graphic work — feminine aesthetic preferred, plus any client work)

- Your resume



Start your application with “LUXE” so we know you’ve read the full description.



Note: Shortlisted applicants will be given a paid trial task.

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (Digital Marketing & Coaching Focus)

Remote | Full-Time | Cross-Functional Teams



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive Project Manager with a passion for digital marketing, personal development, and coaching. In this role, you won’t just manage timelines—you’ll lead client and internal projects from start to finish, ensuring everything runs smoothly, efficiently, and with purpose.



If you thrive in fast-paced environments, enjoy working with creative and strategic teams, and know how to keep digital campaigns on track while fostering positive relationships, this one’s for you.



As our Project Manager, you’ll own multiple client and internal projects across the coaching and digital marketing space. You’ll lead initiatives related to content creation, campaign launches,
 marketing, funnel builds, virtual events, and more—coordinating across departments like design, copywriting, and tech.



You’ll be the central point of alignment, keeping deliverables on track, supporting client needs, and ensuring deadlines are met without sacrificing quality.



Key Responsibilities

-Lead the planning, execution, and delivery of digital marketing & coaching-related projects

-Serve as the primary liaison between internal teams, stakeholders, and clients

-Define project goals, timelines, and deliverables aligned with business and coaching outcomes

-Coordinate across content, design, automation, and client success teams

-Manage timelines using tools like ClickUp, Trello, or Asana

-Run daily/weekly stand-ups, team syncs, and progress check-ins

-Create and improve SOPs, workflows, and systems that enhance team efficiency

-Maintain organized documentation, task tracking, and communication logs



What We're Looking For

-2–5 years of project management experience, preferably in digital marketing or coaching industries

-Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and juggle multiple active projects

-Familiarity with marketing campaigns, launches, or coaching program operations

-Strong experience using project/task management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Trello, etc.)

-Exceptional communication and leadership skills

-Highly detail-oriented, results-driven, and comfortable in remote work environments



Bonus: Experience with funnels,
 platforms (e.g., HighLevel, ActiveCampaign), and coaching client onboarding



What We Offer

-100% remote work with a collaborative, mission-driven team

-The opportunity to manage high-impact projects in coaching and personal development

-Flexible schedule with a culture of ownership and accountability

-Room for growth into strategic or leadership roles

-A team that values clarity, purpose, and transformation—in work and in life



Apply

Move fast and take ownership

Think in results, not tasksUnderstand how to grow and monetize attentionCan manage people AND hold them accountableAre organized but not rigidThrive in a high-energy, entrepreneurial environment

Someone who needs constant directionSomeone who avoids accountabilitySomeone who moves slow or overthinksSomeone who just wants to “manage posts”

title: Funnel Specialist
description:
We are seeking a full-time funnel builder for our growing marketing and event agency. 



YOU MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE.



Job roles include:

*Create and design masterclass / webinar funnels inside of HighLevel & ClickFunnels...

*Create and design challenge funnels inside of HighLevel & Click Funnels...

*Create and design ebook funnels inside of HighLevel & Click Funnels...

*Hookup automations via HighLevel, Zapier, etc...



Pay will be $10 USD  with opportunity for pay increases and bonuses as you gain more experience and time in our company.



You must be proficient in High Level AND ClickFunnels, while also having great internet. We are looking for a funnel builder to create premium work. We also love for our funnel builders to know how to use CSS coding.



If that’s you, we would love for you to apply.



To Apply for the job:

title: Video editor
description:
Video Editor — Social Ads (AI-First) | Scentech | Part time



???



We scale fast. We need someone who edits faster.



Scentech is a Dutch e-commerce brand selling smart home fragrance diffusers. We run Meta ads every week. Good ones. The kind that stop the scroll and move product.



We're looking for a video editor who uses AI tools the way a good chef uses knives — naturally, instinctively, without thinking twice about it. You know how to fill gaps. Real footage, AI-generated clips, stock — whatever it takes to make the edit land.



???



What you'll do



• Edit 5+ short-for
ta ads per week (9:16, 15–30 sec)

• Occasionally produce polished Google video ads (16:9)

• Work from detailed creative briefs — references, structure, copy, and branding are provided

• Mix real footage with AI-generated or stock content when needed

• Deliver multiple variants per concept (we test everything)



???



What we need



• You've edited Meta ads before — and you have the work to prove it

• You have a real understanding of direct-response ad structure: hook ? problem ? solution ? offer

• AI tools are part of your standard workflow (Kling, Runway, Pika, ElevenLabs — you pick, as long as you use them)

• You can work with voiceover, text overlays, music — and know when to use which

• You deliver on time, take feedback well, and don't disappear between rounds

• You communicate in English



???



What this looks like in practice



We'll send you a creative brief with reference videos and a Google Drive folder of footage. Your job is to make something better than the reference — using whatever tools and techniques you need to get there.



Sometimes the footage is complete. Sometimes it's not. We expect you to solve that, not flag it.



???



The role



Contractor. Project-based to start — minimum 5 videos per week. As we grow, you grow with us. This is a long-term relationship if the work is good.



???



To apply



Send your portfolio or at least one example of a Meta ad you've edited — plus a short answer to this question:



"Which AI tools do you use in your editing workflow, and what do you use them for?"



To apply



Send an
 to 

Subject line must include: SCENTECH



Include the following in your
:



1. Your portfolio

Share a public Google Drive folder with at least 1 example of a Meta ad you've edited. Make sure the link is set to "Anyone with the link can view" — we can't review private links.



2. Your AI tools

Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "Which AI tools do you use in your editing workflow, and what do you use them for?"



Applications without a public portfolio link and without SCENTECH in the subject will not be reviewed.

title: Short-form Video Editor
description:
Role Overview:



We are looking for a dedicated Short-form Video Editor to produce 8-10 high-performing video creatives per week for TikTok and Meta (Instagram/Facebook). You will be responsible for taking raw footage (UGC and product shots) and turning them into engaging, high-converting ads.



Ads need: motion graphics, AI automation. 



EDITORS’ QUALIFICATIONS: 



-Proven experience (4+ years) in video editing and production, preferably within the e-commerce industry



-Proven experience in editing video adverts for social media ads (such as UGC, motion graphic and high-production)



-Proficiency in editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, Capcut, Adobe After Effects or similar tools



-Strong understanding of TikTok and Meta, its features, and what makes content on the platform engaging and shareable



-Knowledge of short-form video content best practices, as well as what drives conversions and sales on social media



-Ability to work well under pressure and manage multiple projects with tight deadlines



-Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with a strong attention to detail (including strong ability in speaking and writing the English language)



-Self-motivated, proactive, and capable of working independently or as part of a team



-Knowledge of additional social media platforms (e.g., Instagram, YouTube) is a plus

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Hi there,



I’m looking to bring on a high-level Virtual Assistant to work closely with me across several businesses and areas of my life, and I wanted to reach out to see if this might be a good fit for you.



A bit about me: I’m a physician and executive involved in multiple organizations, including a healthcare company, a real estate development firm, and a nonprofit. My schedule and responsibilities are growing quickly, and I’m looking for someone who can act as both a personal assistant and executive assistant—someone I can trust to help bring structure, organization, and follow-through to a wide range of tasks.



Here are some of the key areas I’d be looking for support with:



1. Calendar & Scheduling Management



Coordinating and managing a complex calendar across multiple businesses and personal commitments

Scheduling meetings, calls, and travel

Anticipating conflicts and helping prioritize time effectively



2. Communication & Follow-Up



Drafting and sending
s and messages on my behalf

Following up with clients, partners, and internal tea
mbers

Helping ensure nothing falls through the cracks



3. Business Support



Assisting with proposals, presentations, and documents

Organizing files, notes, and key information

Light research and data gathering for projects



4. Marketing & Online Presence



Assisting with posting content online (social media, etc.)

Helping organize and manage content ideas

Supporting outreach efforts when needed



5. Research & Administrative Tasks



Researching opportunities (including grants, partnerships, vendors, etc.)

Assisting with grant identification and submissions (especially for nonprofit work)

General administrative support as needed



6. Personal Support



Helping manage personal scheduling and priorities

Assisting with travel, reminders, and day-to-day organization



What I’m really looking for is someone who:



Is highly organized and detail-oriented

Communicates clearly and professionally

Is proactive and can anticipate needs (not just react)

Is comfortable handling a variety of tasks across different domains

Can grow into a long-term, trusted role



This would ideally start part-time with the potential to grow into a larger role over time if it’s a good fit.



If this sounds like something you’d be interested in, I’d love to learn more about your experience and how you like to work.



Looking forward to connecting,

Jonathan

title: Real Estate client support representative

This role is critical for delivering consistent, high-quality marketing and client touchpoints for multiple real estate clients. You will work closely with an Account Manager to create daily marketing materials, manage client deliverables, and ensure all communications are accurate, on-brand, and delivered on time.

 Collecting data for clients on a weekly basis, and producing material for clients representing said Data

Create and design marketing materials using Canva (listing posts,

Prepare and manage
 campaigns for real estate agents’ sphere of influence

Assist with listing marketing (new listings, price reductions, updates, just sold announcements)Build and maintain templated systems for repeatable client marketing

Work directly with an Account Manager to execute daily tasks efficiently

 experience with Canva / google docs

Excellent attention to detail

Strong written English (for
s and marketing content)

Ability to follow systems and processes

Highly organized and able to manage multiple tasks/clients

What We’re Looking For:

Compensation & Growth:
